upload.install_instructions: *---------------------------------------------------------------- ------ * 1. Upload entire XML to your AS/400 to a source file 112 long, into any mbr * name not in this XML (suggest member name like ABCX or XYZX). The source * file must be in the library where source and objects are to be installed. * * 2. If you have XMLPREVIEW installed, skip to step 3. * * Copy the text between the start tag <install_program> and the end * tag </install_program> into any member name (your choice) * in file QRPGLESRC member type RPGLE. CRTBNDRPG to compile. * NOTE: You need extract the install program only once, this same program * will install any upload on this page. * * 3. Call the install program (or execute XmlPrevew) passing these 3 parms. * 'your-member-name you uploaded this text into' * 'your-source-file-name the member is in' * 'your-library-name the source file is in' * * The various source members will be extracted and the objects required * for the application will be created in your-library-name. *---------------------------------------------------------------- ------
upload.install_program: * /// START OF INSTALL PGM HERE ************************** /// *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Parse / Install from xml text into source members and objects. * Copyright (C) 2001 Craig Rutledge <craig_rutledge@mohawkind.com> * Martin Rowe <Martin@dbg400.net> scripting cmd prompts * David George <webmaster@400times.co.uk> intellectual input * Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> execute SQL statements * Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> conditions * Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> release * Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> retrieve object description * * Use xml tags in text to trigger: * 1. Parse text into source members (create srcfile & member if required). * 2. Compile source into objects. * 3. Send installation progress user messages. * 4. Execute qcmdexc as required. * 5. Execute SQL statements as required. * * This program is free software, you can redistribute it and/or modify it * under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by * the Free Software Foundation. See GNU General Public License for details *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- H DFTACTGRP(*NO) ACTGRP(*CALLER) BNDDIR('QC2LE') *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Fxmlinput if f 112 disk usropn uploaded text Fqxxxsrc o f 112 disk usropn parsed out *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * create parm prototypes *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Tokenize String D strtok PR * extproc('strtok') D i_string * value options(*string) D i_token * value options(*string) * retrieve member description D qusrmbrd PR ExtPgm('QUSRMBRD') MEMBER DESCRIPTION D o_rcvVar 32767a options(*varsize) RECEIVER D i_lenRcvVar 10i 0 const LENGTH OF RECVR D i_format 8 const UPLOAD TYPE D i_qFile 20 const FILE LIB D i_mbr 10 const MEMBER NAME D i_ovverride 1 const PROCESS OVERIDE D io_errCode 32767a options(*varsize) ERROR CODE * retrieve object description D QUSROBJD... D PR extpgm('QUSROBJD') D o_rcvVar 65535A options(*varsize) D i_lenRcvVar 10I 0 const D i_format 8A const D i_qObj 20A const D i_type 10A const D io_errCode 65535A options(*nopass: *varsize) | OptGrp 1 * send program message D qmhsndpm PR ExtPgm('QMHSNDPM') SEND MESSAGES D i_msgID 7a const ID D i_qMsgF 20a const FILE D i_msgText 32767a const options(*varsize) TEXT D i_lenMsgText 10i 0 const LENGTH D i_msgType 10a const TYPE D i_callStackE 10a const STACK ENTRY D i_callStackC 10i 0 const STACK COUNTER D i_msgKey 4a const KEY D io_errCode 32767a options(*varsize) ERROR CODE * execute cl command D qcmdexc PR ExtPgm('QCMDEXC') D i_cmd 50a Const D i_lenCmd 15p 5 Const * Allocate Environment Handle D SQLAllocEnv... D PR extproc('SQLAllocEnv') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D o_phenv * value * Allocate Connection Handle D SQLAllocConnect... D PR extproc('SQLAllocConnect') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_henv value like(SQLHENV_t ) D o_phdbc * value * Connect to a Data Source D SQLConnect... D PR extproc('SQLConnect') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hdbc value like(SQLHDBC_t ) D i_szDSN * value options(*string) D i_cbDSN value like(SQLSMALLINT_t) D i_szUID * value options(*string) D i_cbUID value like(SQLSMALLINT_t) D i_szAuthStr * value options(*string) D i_cbAuthStr value like(SQLSMALLINT_t) * Set Connection Option D SQLSetConnectOption... D PR extproc('SQLSetConnectOption') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hdbc value like(SQLHDBC_t ) D i_fOption value like(SQLSMALLINT_t) D i_vParam value like(SQLPOINTER_t ) * Allocate a Statement Handle D SQLAllocStmt... D PR extproc('SQLAllocStmt') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hdbc value like(SQLHDBC_t ) D o_phstmt * value * Execute a Statement Directly D SQLExecDirect... D PR extproc('SQLExecDirect') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hstmt value like(SQLHSTMT_t ) D i_szSqlStr * value options(*string) D i_cbSqlStr value like(SQLINTEGER_t) * Free (or Reset) a Statement Handle D SQLFreeStmt... D PR extproc('SQLFreeStmt') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hstmt value like(SQLHSTMT_t ) D i_fOption value like(SQLSMALLINT_t) * Disconnect from a Data Source D SQLDisconnect... D PR extproc('SQLDisconnect') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hdbc value like(SQLHDBC_t ) * Free Connection Handle D SQLFreeConnect... D PR extproc('SQLFreeConnect') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_hdbc value like(SQLHDBC_t ) * Free Environment Handle D SQLFreeEnv... D PR extproc('SQLFreeEnv') D like(SQLRETURN_t ) D i_henv value like(SQLHENV_t ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D long_t S 10I 0 based(pDummy) D short_t S 5I 0 based(pDummy) * D SQLINTEGER_t S like(long_t ) based(pDummy) D SQLSMALLINT_t S like(short_t ) based(pDummy) * D PTR_t S * based(pDummy) D SQLPOINTER_t S like(PTR_t ) based(pDummy) D HENV_t S like(long_t ) based(pDummy) D HDBC_t S like(long_t ) based(pDummy) D HSTMT_t S like(long_t ) based(pDummy) D RETCODE_t S like(SQLINTEGER_t) based(pDummy) * D SQLHENV_t S like(HENV_t ) based(pDummy) D SQLHDBC_t S like(HDBC_t ) based(pDummy) D SQLHSTMT_t S like(HSTMT_t ) based(pDummy) D SQLRETURN_t S like(RETCODE_t ) based(pDummy) * D retCode S like(SQLRETURN_t) inz D hdbc S like(SQLHDBC_t ) inz D hstmt S like(SQLHSTMT_t ) inz D henv S like(SQLHENV_t ) inz D sqlInit S 1A inz(*off) D cOptVal S 10I 0 inz * D SQL_NTS C const( -3) D SQL_COMMIT_NONE... D C const( 1) D SQL_ATTR_COMMIT... D C const( 0) D SQL_DROP C const( 1) *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Read element *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D readElement PR like(bldexc) D i_element 9A value varying *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Define function prototype to double quotes in a string *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D dblQuotes PR 2048A varying D i_string 2048A value varying *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Define function prototype to get attribute data from a string *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D getAttrData... D PR 2000A varying like(string_t) D i_attr 10a value D i_string 2000A value varying like(string_t) D i_default 2000A value varying like(string_t) *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Define function prototype to check for a condition *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D isCondition... D PR n D i_condList 2000A value *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D loadConditions... D PR dim(32) like(condition) D i_conditions 128A value *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D getCurrentRelease... D PR 10A *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D isRelease... D PR n D i_os_release 6A value D i_release 10A value *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D setTargetRelease... D PR 2000A varying D i_keyword 10A value varying D i_string 2000A value varying D i_value 10A value varying *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D setVariable... D PR D i_fldName 10A value varying D i_value 64A value varying *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D getVarName... D PR 11a varying D i_bldexc value like(bldexc) D i_pos 10i 0 value *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D getVarValue... D PR 64a varying D i_name 11a value varying *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D uCase... D PR 2000A varying D i_string 2000A value varying *-------------------------------------------------------------------- D vrcvar s 145 D qm_msgid s 7 D qm_msgtxt s 500 D qm_msgq s 10 D qm_msgtyp s 10 D mbrname s 10 D mbrtype s 10 D mbrtext s 50 D srcfile s 10 D srclen s 5 D srclenN s 5 0 inz(0) D srccssid s 5 D bldexc s 2000 D write_flag s 1n inz(*off) D srcSeqno s 6s 2 inz(0) D aa s 5u 0 inz(0) D ll s 5u 0 inz(0) D qs c '''' D qd c '"' D errFLag s 1 inz(*off) D cnd_msg s 42 D cnd_values s 110 D cnd_rtnVal s 10 D cnd_array s dim(32) inz like(condition) D cnd_ptr s 10i 0 inz D condition s 10a D condList s 2000a D release s 10a D dltsplf s 10a D objd_obj s 10a D objd_lib s 10a D objd_objtype s 10a D objd_rtnlib s 10a D objd0100 ds D od_bytRet 1 4i 0 D od_bytAvl 5 8i 0 D od_name 9 18a D od_lib 19 28a D od_type 29 38a D od_rtnLib 39 48a D fld_array ds D fld_x 10i 0 inz D fld_name 11a inz dim(64) varying D fld_value 64a inz dim(64) varying D var_name s 11a inz varying D var_value s 64a inz varying * Error return code parm for APIs. D errCode DS D errCode_bytPrv... D 10i 0 inz(%size(errCode)) D errCode_bytAvl... D 10i 0 inz(0) D errCode_excID... D 7a inz D errCode_reserved... D 1a inz D errCode_escData... D 256a inz * Optional parameters D OvrSrcFile s like(i_OvrSrcFile) inz D isPreDefCond s N inz(*off) D TgtRls s like(i_TgtRls ) inz * * Program status data structure. D sds sds D sds_pgmName 10A D sds_status 5S 0 D sds_prvStat 5S 0 D sds_lastSeq 8A D sds_lastSubR 8A D sds_numParm 3S 0 D sds_msgID 7A D sds_MiInstr 4A D sds_wrkArea 30A D sds_lib 10A D sds_msgText 80A *-------------------------------------------------------------------- Ixmlinput ns I 13 21 xmltag1 I 18 27 xmltag2 I 13 112 xmlcode *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C *entry plist C parm ParseSrcMbr 10 source member C parm ParseSrcFile 10 source file C parm ParseSrcLib 10 source lib * optional parameters: C parm i_OvrSrcFile 10 override to src C parm i_Conditions 128 pre-def conditions C parm i_TgtRls 10 target release * * get optional parameter: Overrride to Source File C if %parms() >= 4 C eval OvrSrcFile = i_OvrSrcFile C else C eval OvrSrcFile = '' C endif * * get optional parameter: Conditions C if %parms() >= 5 C if %subst(i_Conditions:1:32) <> '' C eval cnd_array = loadConditions(i_Conditions) C eval isPreDefCond = *on C else C eval isPreDefCond = *off C endif C endif * * get optional parameter: Target Release C if %parms() >= 6 C eval TgtRls = i_TgtRls C else C eval TgtRls = getCurrentRelease() C endif * C exsr srValidate make sure exist * * Set user selected library *first for remainder of program C eval bldexc = 'RMVLIBLE LIB('+ C %trimr(ParseSrcLib) + ')' C callp(e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) * C eval bldexc = 'ADDLIBLE LIB('+ C %trimr(ParseSrcLib) + ') POSITION(*FIRST)' C callp(e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) * * CPF2103 - Library &1 already exists in library list. C if %error and sds_msgID <> 'CPF2103' C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 ' + sds_msgText C exsr srKill C endif * * Set variable &TOLIB C callp setVariable('tolib': ParseSrcLib) * * Override Input file to uploaded text file C eval bldexc = 'OVRDBF FILE(XMLINPUT) TOFILE(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ C %trimr(ParseSrcFile) + ') MBR(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcMbr) + ')' C callp qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C open xmlinput C read xmlinput C dow not %eof * write records to outfile if flag is on C select C when write_flag = *on C if xmltag2<>'</copysrc>' C eval srcSeqno=srcSeqno+1 C except write_one C else C eval write_flag=*off C close qxxxsrc C endif * * Extract values based on xml tags. C when xmltag1 = 'mbrname =' C eval mbrname = %subst(xmlcode:13:10) C when xmltag1 = 'mbrtype =' C eval mbrtype =%subst(xmlcode:13:10) C when xmltag1 = 'mbrtext =' C eval mbrtext =dblQuotes(%subst(xmlcode:13:50)) C when xmltag1 = 'srcfile =' C if OvrSrcFile <> '' C eval srcfile =OvrSrcFile C else C eval srcfile =%subst(xmlcode:13:10) C endif C when xmltag1 = 'srclen =' C eval srclen =%subst(xmlcode:13:5) C when xmltag1 = 'srccssid=' C eval srccssid=%subst(xmlcode:13:5) *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Start of data to copy. Create source files/mbrs as required. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1='<copysrc>' C move srclen srclenN * crtsrcpf C eval bldexc = 'CRTSRCPF FILE(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ C %trimr(srcfile) + ') RCDLEN(' + C srclen + ') CCSID(' + C srccssid + ')' C callp(e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) * addpfm C eval bldexc = 'ADDPFM FILE(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ C %trimr(srcfile) + ') MBR(' + C %trimr(mbrname) + ') SRCTYPE(' + C %trimr(mbrtype) + ') TEXT(' + C qs+%trimr(mbrtext)+qs + ')' C callp(e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C if %error * chgpfm C eval bldexc = 'CHGPFM FILE(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ C %trimr(srcfile) + ') MBR(' + C %trimr(mbrname) + ') TEXT(' + C qs+%trimr(mbrtext)+qs + ')' C callp qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) * clr mbr C eval bldexc = 'CLRPFM FILE(' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ C %trimr(srcfile) + ') MBR(' + C %trimr(mbrname) + ')' C callp qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C endif * ovr to outfile mbr C eval bldexc = 'OVRDBF QXXXSRC ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib) + '/' + C %trimr(srcfile) + ' ' + C mbrname C callp qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C clear srcSeqno C open qxxxsrc C eval write_flag = *on *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Compile statement. Read next record and execute it. * The subroutine TolibToken will replace &tolib with the * library the user has selected at run time. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<compile ' C eval condList= getAttrData('condition':xmlcode:'') C read xmlinput C eval bldexc = readElement('compile') C if isCondition(condList) C exsr TolibToken C exsr RplVars C exsr SetTgtRls C callp qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C endif *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * qcmdexc statement. Build statement from each record between start * and stop tags. When stop tag is found, execute statement. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<qcmdexc ' C eval condList = getAttrData('condition' C :xmlcode:'') C eval release = getAttrData('release' C :xmlcode:'*CURRENT') C eval dltsplf = getAttrData('dltsplf' C :xmlcode:'*NONE') C read xmlinput C eval bldexc = readElement('qcmdexc') C if isCondition(condList) and C isRelease(tgtRls: release) C exsr TolibToken C exsr RplVars C exsr SetTgtRls C if %subst(bldexc: 1: 3) = 'DLT' C callp (e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C else C callp (e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C if %error() C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Failed to execute: '+bldexc C exsr srKill C endif C if dltsplf <> '' and dltsplf <> '*NONE' C eval bldexc = 'DLTSPLF FILE(' + dltsplf + C ') JOB(*) SPLNBR(*LAST)' C callp (e) qcmdexc(bldexc:%len(%trimr(bldexc))) C endif C endif C endif *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * SQL statement. Build statement from each record between start * and stop tags. When stop tag is found, execute SQL statement. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<execsql ' C eval condList = getAttrData('condition' C :xmlcode:'') C read xmlinput C eval bldexc = readElement('execsql') C if isCondition(condList) C exsr TolibToken C exsr RplVars C exsr srSQLExecute C endif *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Send messages to user as program executes * Extract message ID, Message Type, from <sendmsg> * read a record and get the single line of message text. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<sendmsg ' C eval qm_msgid = %subst(xmlcode:22:7) C eval qm_msgtyp = %subst(xmlcode:46:10) C read xmlinput C eval qm_msgq = '*EXT ' C eval qm_msgtxt = xmlcode C exsr srSndMessage *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * rtvobjd statement. retrieve object description of the specified * object. Store attributes in specified fields. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<rtvobjd ' C eval condList = getAttrData('condition' C :xmlcode:'') C eval bldexc = readElement('rtvobjd') C eval objd_obj =getAttrData('obj' :bldexc:'') C eval objd_lib =getAttrData('lib' :bldexc:'') C eval objd_objtype=getAttrData('objtype':bldexc:'') C eval objd_rtnlib =getAttrData('rtnlib' :bldexc:'') C if isCondition(condList) C exsr srRtvObjD C endif *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * chgvar statement. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<chgvar ' C eval condList = getAttrData('condition' C :xmlcode:'') C eval bldexc = readElement('chgvar') C eval var_name = getAttrData('var' :bldexc:'') C eval var_value = getAttrData('value' :bldexc:'') C if isCondition(condList) C exsr srChgVar C endif *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Query condition *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C when xmltag1 = '<qrycond ' C eval bldexc = readElement('qrycond') C eval cnd_msg = getAttrData('msg' : bldexc:'') C eval cnd_values = getAttrData('values': bldexc:'') C exsr srQueryCond C endsl * C read xmlinput C enddo * C exsr srSQLEnd C eval *inlr=*on C return *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Replace &tolib (no matter how many times it is in the string) * with whatever library the user has selected at run time. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C TolibToken begsr C eval aa=%scan('&tolib':bldexc) C dow aa>0 C eval bldexc=%replace(%trimr(ParseSrcLib):bldexc: C aa:6) C eval aa=%scan('&tolib':bldexc) C enddo * user has selected to override source, reset SRCFILE parm in bldexcs. C if OvrSrcFile <> '' xmlpreview override C eval aa=%scan('SRCFILE(':bldexc) C if aa>0 C eval aa=%scan('/':bldexc:aa) C if aa>0 C eval ll=%scan(')':bldexc:aa) C eval bldexc=%replace( C %trimr(OvrSrcFile):bldexc:aa+1:ll-(aa+1)) C endif C endif C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Replace variable names with their associated values. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C RplVars begsr C eval aa=%scan('&':bldexc) C dow aa>0 C eval var_name=getVarName(bldexc:aa) C eval var_value=getVarValue(var_name) C eval bldexc=%replace(var_value:bldexc:aa C :%len(var_name)) C eval aa=%scan('&':bldexc) C enddo C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Sets the target release according to the optional parameter * i_TgtRls. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C SetTgtRls begsr C if TgtRls = getCurrentRelease() C leavesr C endif C eval bldexc = C setTargetRelease('TGTRLS': bldexc: TgtRls) C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Check of file, lib, member exist. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srValidate begsr C callp QUSRMBRD( C vrcvar: C 145: C 'MBRD0100': C ParseSrcFile + ParseSrcLib: C ParseSrcMbr: C '0': C errCode) * -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * If error occurred on call, send appropriate message back to user. * --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C if errCode_bytAvl <> 0 error occurred C select * lib not found C when errCode_excID = 'CPF9810' C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Library ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib) + ' was not found.' * src file not found C when errCode_excID = 'CPF9812' C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Source file ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcFile)+' was not found in ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib) + '.' * member not found C when errCode_excID = 'CPF9815' C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Member ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcMbr)+' was not found in ' + C %trimr(ParseSrcLib)+'/'+ %trimr(ParseSrcFile) * unexpected C other C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Unexpected message ' + C errCode_excID + ' received. ' C endsl * send message C exsr srKill C eval *inlr=*on C return C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * kill application *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srKill begsr C eval qm_msgid = 'CPD0006' C eval qm_msgtyp = '*DIAG' C eval qm_msgq = '*CTLBDY' C exsr srSndMessage C eval qm_msgtxt = *blanks C eval qm_msgid = 'CPF0002' C eval qm_msgtyp = '*ESCAPE' C exsr srSndMessage C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * call send program message api *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srSndMessage begsr C callp QMHSNDPM( C qm_msgid: C 'QCPFMSG *LIBL ': C qm_msgtxt: C %size(qm_msgtxt): C qm_msgtyp: C qm_msgq: C 1: C ' ': C errCode) C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * retrieve object description and store attributes *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srRtvObjD begsr C callp QUSROBJD(objd0100 C : %size(objd0100) C : 'OBJD0100' C : objd_obj + objd_lib C : objd_objtype C : errCode) C if errCode_bytAvl <> 0 error occurred C eval qm_msgtxt = '0000 Failed to retrieve + C object description of object ' + C %trim(objd_lib) + '/' + %trim(objd_obj) + C ' type ' + %trim(objd_objtype) + '.' * send message C exsr srKill C else C callp setVariable(objd_rtnlib: od_rtnlib) C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * change variable *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srChgVar begsr C callp setVariable(var_name: var_value) C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * execute SQL statement. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srSQLExecute begsr C exsr srSQLInit C Eval retCode = SQLExecDirect(hstmt : C bldexc : C SQL_NTS ) C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * query condition. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srQueryCond begsr C if isPreDefCond = *off C eval cnd_values = uCase(cnd_values) C dou (%scan(cnd_rtnVal: cnd_values) > 0) and C (cnd_rtnval <> '' ) C eval cnd_rtnval = ' ' C cnd_msg dsply cnd_rtnval C eval cnd_rtnVal = uCase(cnd_rtnVal) C enddo C eval cnd_ptr = cnd_ptr + 1 C eval cnd_array(cnd_ptr) = cnd_rtnVal C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * initialize SQL. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srSQLInit begsr * C if sqlInit = *off C Eval retCode = SQLAllocEnv(%addr(henv)) C Eval retCode = SQLAllocConnect(henv: %addr(hdbc)) C Eval retCode = SQLConnect(hdbc : C '*LOCAL' : C SQL_NTS : C *null : C SQL_NTS : C *null : C SQL_NTS ) C Eval cOptVal = SQL_COMMIT_NONE C Eval retCode = SQLSetConnectOption(hdbc : C SQL_ATTR_COMMIT: C %addr(cOptVal) ) C Eval retCode = SQLAllocStmt(hdbc : C %addr(hstmt) ) C eval sqlInit = *on C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * end SQL. *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C srSQLEnd begsr C if sqlInit = *on C Eval retCode = SQLFreeStmt(hstmt : C SQL_DROP ) C Eval retCode = SQLDisconnect(hdbc) C Eval retCode = SQLFreeConnect(hdbc) C Eval retCode = SQLFreeEnv(henv) C eval sqlInit = *off C endif C endsr *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * error handler *-------------------------------------------------------------------- C *pssr begsr C if errFLag = *off C eval errFlag = *on C exsr srSQLEnd C endif C endsr '*CANCL' Oqxxxsrc e write_one O srcSeqno 6 O 12 '000000' O xmlcode 112 *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Read element *-------------------------------------------------------------------- P readElement... P B * D readElement PI like(bldexc) D i_element 9A value varying * D i S 10I 0 inz D value S like(bldexc ) inz D endTag S like(xmlTag2) inz * C eval i = 1 C eval endTag = '</' + i_element + '>' C dow xmltag2 <> endTag C eval %subst(value: i: %len(xmlcode)) = xmlcode C eval i = i + %len(xmlcode) C read xmlinput C enddo * C Return value * P readElement... P E *-------------------------------------------------------------------- * Double quotes *-------------------------------------------------------------------- P dblQuotes... P B * D dblQuotes PI 2048A varying D i_string 2048A value varying * D x S 10I 0 inz D string S 2048A varying inz * C For x = 1 to %len(i_string) C Eval string = string + %subst(i_string: x:1) C If %subst(i_string: x : 1) = qs C Eval string = string + qs C Endif C Endfor * C Return string * P dblQuotes... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Get Attribute Data from String *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P getAttrData... P B * D getAttrData... D PI 2000A varying like(string_t) D i_attr 10a value D i_string 2000A value varying like(string_t) D i_default 2000A value varying like(string_t) * * return value D attrData S 2000A varying inz like(string_t) * * local fields D attr S 20a varying inz D lenAttr S 10i 0 inz D aa S 10i 0 inz D cc S 10i 0 inz * D Qd C const('"') *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * * find the keyword C eval attr = %trim(i_attr) + '=' + Qd * C eval aa = %scan(attr: i_string) C if aa = 0 C return i_default C endif * C eval aa = aa + %len(attr) C eval cc = %scan(Qd: i_string: aa+1) * * return the data between the double-quotes C if (cc-aa) > 0 C eval attrData = %subst(i_string: aa: cc-aa) C endif * C Return attrData * P getAttrData... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Load condition array *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P loadConditions... P B * D loadConditions... D PI dim(32) like(condition) D i_conditions 128A value * * return value D cnd_array s dim(32) inz like(condition) D pValue s * inz D x s 10i 0 inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* C eval i_conditions = uCase(i_conditions) * C eval pValue = strtok(i_conditions: ';') C dow pValue <> *null C eval x = x + 1 C eval cnd_array(x) = %str(pValue) C eval pValue = strtok(*null: ';') C enddo * C Return cnd_array P loadConditions... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Check for a condition *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P isCondition... P B * D isCondition... D PI n D i_condList 2000A value * * return value D isCondition S n inz D pValue S * inz D aCondition S 10a inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* C eval i_condList = uCase(i_condList) * C if (i_condList = '*NONE') or C (i_condList = '' ) C eval *in01 = *on C else * C eval pValue = strtok(i_condList: ' ') C dow pValue <> *null C eval aCondition = %str(pValue) C aCondition lookup cnd_array 01 C if not *in01 C leave C endif C eval pValue = strtok(*null : ' ') C enddo * C endif * C if *in01 C eval isCondition = *on C else C eval isCondition = *off C endif * C Return isCondition P isCondition... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Get the current release level of the operation system *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P getCurrentRelease... P B * D getCurrentRelease... D PI 10A * * QSZRTVPR API D QSZRTVPR... D PR extpgm('QSZRTVPR') D o_rcvVar 65535A options(*varsize) D i_lenRcvVar 10I 0 const D i_format 8A const D o_prodInf 65535A const options(*varsize) D io_errCode 65535A options(*varsize) * D prdi0100 DS qualified D productID 1 7A inz('*OPSYS') D releaseLvl 8 13A inz('*CUR' ) D productOpt 14 17A inz('0000' ) D loadID 18 27A inz('*CODE' ) * Shortened!: D prdr0100 DS qualified D bytRet 1 4I 0 D bytAvl 5 8I 0 D reserved_1 9 12I 0 D productID 13 19A D releaseLvl 20 25A * API error code D errCode DS D bytPrv 10i 0 inz(0) D bytAvl 10i 0 inz(0) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* C Callp QSZRTVPR(prdr0100: %size(prdr0100): C 'PRDR0100': prdi0100: errCode) C Return prdr0100.releaseLvl P getCurrentRelease... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Check the release level *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P isRelease... P B * D isRelease... D PI n D i_os_release 6A value D i_release 10A value * * return value D isRelease S n inz(*off) * Release D release DS D r_operator 1 3a D r_space 4 4a D r_level 5 10a *-------------------------------------------------------------------* C If i_release = '*CURRENT' C Eval isRelease = *on C Else C Eval release = i_release C Select C When r_operator = '*LT' and C i_os_release < r_level C Eval isRelease = *on C When r_operator = '*EQ' and C i_os_release = r_level C Eval isRelease = *on C When r_operator = '*GT' and C i_os_release > r_level C Eval isRelease = *on C When r_operator = '*LE' and C i_os_release <= r_level C Eval isRelease = *on C When r_operator = '*GE' and C i_os_release >= r_level C Eval isRelease = *on C Other C Eval isRelease = *off C Endsl C Endif * C Return isRelease P isRelease... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Replaces the value of a given keyword. *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P setTargetRelease... P B * D setTargetRelease... D PI 2000A varying D i_keyword 10A value varying D i_string 2000A value varying D i_value 10A value varying * * return value D string S 2000A varying inz * * helper fields D x S 10I 0 inz D l S 10I 0 inz D tmpKeyword S like(i_keyword) inz D tmpString S like(i_string ) inz D tmpCmd S 10A inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* /FREE tmpKeyword = uCase(%trimR(i_keyword)); tmpString = uCase(%trimR(i_string )); x = %scan(' ': tmpString); if x = 0; return i_string; endif; tmpCmd = %subst(tmpString: 1: x); if tmpCmd <> 'CRTRPGMOD' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTRPGPGM' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCLMOD' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCLPGM' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCBLMOD' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCBLPGM' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCMOD' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTCPPMOD' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDC' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDCBL' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDCL' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDCPP' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDDIR' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTBNDRPG' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTPGM' and tmpCmd <> 'CRTSRVPGM' ; return i_string; endif; x = %scan(tmpKeyword + '(': tmpString); if x = 0; return %trimR(i_string) + ' ' + tmpKeyword + '(' + %trimR(i_value) + ')'; endif; l = %scan(')': tmpString: x + %len(i_keyword) + 1); if l = 0; return i_string; endif; l = l - x + 1; string = %replace(tmpKeyword + '(' + %trimR(i_value) + ')' : i_string: x: l); Return string; /END-FREE * P setTargetRelease... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * Store field value. *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P setVariable... P B * D setVariable... D PI D i_fldName 10A value varying D i_value 64A value varying D i s 10I 0 inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* /FREE if (i_fldName = ''); return; endif; for i = 1 to fld_x; if (uCase('&' + %trim(i_fldName)) = uCase(fld_name(fld_x))); fld_value(fld_x) = i_value; leave; endif; endfor; if (fld_x >= %elem(fld_name)); return; endif; fld_x = fld_x + 1; fld_name(fld_x) = uCase('&' + %trim(i_fldName)); fld_value(fld_x) = i_value; /END-FREE * P setVariable... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * get variable name from statement. *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P getVarName... P B * D getVarName... D PI 11a varying D i_bldexc value like(bldexc) D i_pos 10i 0 value D name s 11a varying inz D CHARS c '&ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ+ D 1234567890_' *-------------------------------------------------------------------* /FREE dow (i_pos<=%len(i_bldexc) and %check(CHARS:%subst(i_bldexc:i_pos:1))=0); name = name+%subst(i_bldexc:i_pos:1); i_pos=i_pos+1; enddo; return name; /END-FREE * P getVarName... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * get variable value. *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P getVarValue... P B * D getVarValue... D PI 64a varying D i_name 11a value varying D i s 10i 0 inz D value s 64a varying inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* /FREE for i=1 to fld_x; if (ucase(fld_name(i))=uCase(i_name)); value=%trimR(fld_value(i)); leave; endif; endfor; return value; /END-FREE * P getVarValue... P E *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- * convert to upper case *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- P uCase... P B * D uCase... D PI 2000A varying D i_string 2000A value varying D uCase s 2000A inz varying D LC C const('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz') D UC C CONST('ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ') *-------------------------------------------------------------------* /FREE uCase = %xlate(LC:UC:i_string); return uCase; /END-FREE * P uCase... P E * /// END OF INSTALL PGM HERE ****************************************** /// * /// do not copy past this point ///

.*=====================================================================* .* * .* Kurzdokumentation : * .* * .* Bereich . . . : RUNCLSTM * .* Objekt . . . : RUNCLSTMP * .* Beschreibung : Tool: RUNCLSTM (Run CL Statements ) Ger * .* Author . . . : Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> * .* Datum . . . . : 03.08.2000 * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* * .* This software is free software, you can redistribute it and/or * .* modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) * .* as published by the Free Software Foundation. * .* * .* See GNU General Public License for details. * .* http://www.opensource.org * .* http://www.opensource.org/licenses/gpl-license.html * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* History: * .* * .* Datum Name Ãnderung * .* ---------- ------------ --------------------------------------- * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* >>PRE-COMPILER<< * .* * .* >>CRTCMD<< CRTPNLGRP PNLGRP(&LI/&OB) + * .* SRCFILE(&SL/&SF) + * .* SRCMBR(&SM); * .* * .* >>COMPILE<< * .* >>END-COMPILE<< * .* * .* >>EXECUTE<< * .* * .* >>END-PRE-COMPILER<< * .*=====================================================================* :PNLGRP.
.***************************************************************** .* Provide all the help for the command together in one help ID .* so that it can be used by a search index. .***************************************************************** :HELP name='RUNCLSTM/ALL'. :IMHELP name=RUNCLSTM. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USESRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USESRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/STRSEQ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/ENDSEQ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/LIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/OBJ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TYPECODE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TESTLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TESTOBJ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TGTRLS'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER0'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER1'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER2'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER3'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER4'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER5'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER6'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER7'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER8'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER9'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/NAMING'. :EHELP.
.***************************************************************** .* Primary help text for the command. .***************************************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM'. CL-Anweisungen ausfÃ¼hren - Hilfe :P. Der Befehl RUNCLSTM dient zur AusfÃ¼hrung von OS/400 CL-Befehlen, die in einer Quellenteildatei hinterlegt sind. :P. Neben der AusfÃ¼hrung von CL-Befehlen kÃ¶nnen auch SQL-Anweisungen ausgefÃ¼hrt werden (embedded-SQL). :P. Obwohl der Befehl RUNCLSTM ursprÃ¼nglich entwickelt worden ist, um die eingesetzte Change Management Software an eigene BedÃ¼rfnisse anzupassen, kann er auch ausserhalb der Change Management Software verwendet werden und gute Dienste leisten. :P. Folgende Direktiven werden unterstÃ¼tzt: :P. :PARML. :PT./EXEC SQL :PD.Diese Directive kennzeichnet den Anfang eines SQL-Blocks. Hiermit wird quasi in den SQL-Modus umgeschaltet. Fortsetzungszeilen werden, wie in CL Ã¼blich mit '+' oder '-' gekennzeichnet. Das sonst Ã¼bliche Semikolon als Endekennzeichen einer SQL-Anweisung entfÃ¤llt.
:PT./END-EXEC :PD.Diese Direktive kennzeichnet das Ende eines SQL-Blocks. Hiermit wird der CL-Modus re-aktiviert. :EPARML. :P. :HP3.Achtung::EHP3. :P. Der CL-Befehl :HP2.MONMSG:EHP2. wird nur eingeschrÃ¤nkt unterstÃ¼tzt. Zur Zeit wird nur das SchlÃ¼sselwort :HP2.MSGID:EHP2. erkannt und verarbeitet. Die SchlÃ¼sselworte CMPDTA und EXEC werden nicht erkannt und verarbeitet. :P. Der MONMSG Befehl kann auch fÃ¼r die Ãberwachung von SQL-Anweisungen benutzt werden. :P. Der MONMSG Befehl kann auch generische Nachrichten wie CPF9800 oder CPF000 Ã¼berwachen. :P. Eine globale NachrichtenÃ¼berwachung ist nicht mÃ¶glich. :P. Beispiel: :P. :LINES. 0001.00 0002.00 /EXEC SQL 0003.00 DROP TABLE &LI/MYFILE 0004.00 MONMSG MSGID(SQL0204) 0005.00 0006.00 CREATE TABLE &LI/MYFILE + 0007.00 (FLD1 CHAR (30) NOT NULL WITH DEFAULT, + 0008.00 FLD2 CHAR (30) NOT NULL WITH DEFAULT) 0009.00 /END-EXEC 0010.00 0011.00 DLTCMD CMD(&LI/MYCMD) 0012.00 MONMSG MSGID(CPF2105) 0013.00 :ELINES. :EHELP.
.***************************************************************** .* Help text for the command parameters. .*****************************************************************
.******************************************** .* Keyword: FILE .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/USESRCFILE'. Quellendatei (USESRCFILE) - Hilfe :XH3.Quellendatei (USESRCFILE) :P. Name der Datei, welche die Teildatei mit den auszufÃ¼hrenden CL-Befehle und SQL-Anweisungen enthÃ¤lt. :IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PV.Datei:EPV. :PD.Name der Datei.
:PT.:PK DEF.*LIBL:EPK. :PD.Datei wird Ã¼ber die Bibliotheksliste gesucht. :PT.:PV.Bibliothek:EPV. :PD.Name der Bibliothek, welche die Datei enthÃ¤lt. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: MBR .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/USESRCMBR'. Teildatei (USESRCMBR) - Hilfe :XH3.Teildatei (USESRCMBR) :P. Name der Teildatei, welche die auszufÃ¼hrenden CL-Befehle und SQL-Anweisungen enthÃ¤lt. :IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'. :PARML. :PT.:PV.Teildatei:EPV. :PD. Name der Teildatei. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: STRSEQ .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/STRSEQ'. Startzeilennummer (STRSEQ) - Hilfe :XH3.Startzeilennummer (STRSEQ) :P. Erste auszufÃ¼hrende Zeilennummer in der Teildatei. :IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*FIRST:EPK. :PD.Die AusfÃ¼hrung startet mit der ersten Zeile der Teildatei. :PT.:PV.Startzeilennummer:EPV. :PD.Zeilennummer der ersten auszufÃ¼hrenden Anweisung. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: ENDSEQ .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/ENDSEQ'. Endezeilennummer (ENDSEQ) - Hilfe :XH3.Endezeilennummer (ENDSEQ) :P. Letzte auszufÃ¼hrende Zeilennummer in der Teildatei. :IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*LAST:EPK. :PD.Die AusfÃ¼hrung endet mit der letzten Zeile der Teildatei. :PT.:PV.Startzeilennummer:EPV. :PD.Zeilennummer der letzen auszufÃ¼hrenden Anweisung. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: LIB (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/LIB'. Wert fÃ¼r Bibliothek (&LI) (LIB) - Hilfe :XH3.Wert fÃ¼r Bibliothek (&LI) (LIB) :P. Wert, der fÃ¼r die Ersatzvariable 'Bibliothek' (&LI) eingetragen werden soll. :IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*NONE:EPK. :PD.Es ist kein Wert angegeben. :PT.:PV.Bibliothek:EPV. :PD.Name der Objektbibliothek. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: OBJ (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/OBJ'. Wert fÃ¼r Objekt (&OB) (OBJ) - Hilfe :XH3.Wert fÃ¼r Objekt (&OB) (OBJ) :P. Wert, der fÃ¼r die Ersatzvariable 'Objekt' (&OBJ) eingetragen werden soll. :IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*NONE:EPK. :PD.Es ist kein Wert angegeben. :PT.:PV.Bibliothek:EPV. :PD.Name des Objekts. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: TYPECODE (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/TYPECODE'. Wert fÃ¼r Type Code (&TY) (TYPECODE) - Hilfe :XH3.Wert fÃ¼r Type Code (&TY) (TYPECODE) :P. Wert, der fÃ¼r die Ersatzvariable 'Type Code' (&TY) eingetragen werden soll. :IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*NONE:EPK. :PD.Es ist kein Wert angegeben. :PT.:PV.Type Code:EPV. :PD.Type Code oder auch Benutzerdefiniertes Attribut. :EPARML.

mbr.copysrc:
.*=====================================================================* .* * .* Kurzdokumentation : * .* * .* Bereich . . . : RUNCLSTM * .* Objekt . . . : RUNCLSTMPE * .* Beschreibung : Tool: RUNCLSTM (Run CL Statements ) Eng * .* Author . . . : Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> * .* Datum . . . . : 03.08.2000 * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* * .* This software is free software, you can redistribute it and/or * .* modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) * .* as published by the Free Software Foundation. * .* * .* See GNU General Public License for details. * .* http://www.opensource.org * .* http://www.opensource.org/licenses/gpl-license.html * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* History: * .* * .* Datum Name Ãnderung * .* ---------- ------------ --------------------------------------- * .* * .*=====================================================================* .* >>PRE-COMPILER<< * .* * .* >>CRTCMD<< CRTPNLGRP PNLGRP(&LI/&OB) + * .* SRCFILE(&SL/&SF) + * .* SRCMBR(&SM); * .* * .* >>COMPILE<< * .* >>END-COMPILE<< * .* * .* >>EXECUTE<< * .* * .* >>END-PRE-COMPILER<< * .*=====================================================================* :PNLGRP.
.***************************************************************** .* Provide all the help for the command together in one help ID .* so that it can be used by a search index. .***************************************************************** :HELP name='RUNCLSTM/ALL'. :IMHELP name=RUNCLSTM. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USESRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USESRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/STRSEQ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/ENDSEQ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/LIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/OBJ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TYPECODE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/SRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TESTLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TESTOBJ'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/TGTRLS'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCLIB'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCFILE'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCMBR'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER0'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER1'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER2'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER3'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER4'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER5'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER6'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER7'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER8'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/USER9'. :IMHELP name='RUNCLSTM/NAMING'. :EHELP.
.***************************************************************** .* Primary help text for the command. .***************************************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM'. Run CL Statements - Help :P. RUNCLSTM can be used to excute CL statements from a CL Script member. Just put the CL statements that are to be executed into a source member and run RUNCLSTM against the member. :P. Beside CL statements RUNCLSTM can also execute embedded SQL statements. :P. Although the command originally was designed to help us to customize a change management product RUNCLSTM can also be used stand alone. :P. The following tags are supported by RUNCLSTM: :P. :PARML. :PT./EXEC SQL :PD.This tag marks the beginning of an embedded SQL section. Actually this tag switches RUNCLSTM into SQL mode. In contrast to the SQL syntax RUNCLSTM needs the typical CL continuation character '+' or '-' to identify a continuation line. Also the ';' character as an End-Of-Line marker must not be specified.
:PT./END-EXEC :PD.This Tag marks the end of a SQL section. :EPARML. :P. :HP3.Attention::EHP3. :P. The CL statement :HP2.MONMSG:EHP2. is not fully supported. The keywords CMPDTA and EXEC are not supported. :P. MONMSG *can* be used to monitor SQL errors! :P. MONMSG can also be used to monitor generic messages like CPF9800 or CPF0000. :P. Global error monitoring is not supported.
:P. Example: :P. :LINES. 0001.00 0002.00 /EXEC SQL 0003.00 DROP TABLE &LI/MYFILE 0004.00 MONMSG MSGID(SQL0204) 0005.00 0006.00 CREATE TABLE &LI/MYFILE + 0007.00 (FLD1 CHAR (30) NOT NULL WITH DEFAULT, + 0008.00 FLD2 CHAR (30) NOT NULL WITH DEFAULT) 0009.00 /END-EXEC 0010.00 0011.00 DLTCMD CMD(&LI/MYCMD) 0012.00 MONMSG MSGID(CPF2105) 0013.00 :ELINES. :EHELP.
.***************************************************************** .* Help text for the command parameters. .*****************************************************************
.******************************************** .* Keyword: FILE .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/USESRCFILE'. Source file (USESRCFILE) - Help :XH3.Use source file (USESRCFILE) :P. Specifies the qualified name of the source file that contains the SQL statements to be run.
:IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'. :P. The name of the source file can be qualified by one of the following library values:
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*LIBL:EPK. :PD.All libraries in the job's library list are searched until the first match is found.
:PT.:PV.*CURLIB:EPV. :PD.The current library for the job is searched. If no library is specified as the current library for the job, the QGPL library is used.
:PT.:PV.library-name:EPV. :PD.Specify the name of the library to be searched. :EPARML.
:IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PV.source-file-name:EPV. :PD.Specify the name of the source file that contains the SQL statements to be run. The source file can be a database file or an inline data file. :EPARML.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: MBR .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/USESRCMBR'. Source member (USESRCMBR) - Help :XH3.Source member (USESRCMBR) :P. Specifies the name of the source file member that contains the SQL statements to be run.
:IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: STRSEQ .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/STRSEQ'. Start sequence number (STRSEQ) - Help :XH3.Start sequence number (STRSEQ) :P. The first sequence number to be executed.
:IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: ENDSEQ .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/ENDSEQ'. End sequence number (ENDSEQ) - Help :XH3.End sequence number (ENDSEQ) :P. The last sequence number to be executed.
:IMHELP name='COM/REQPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: LIB (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/LIB'. Value for library (&LI) (LIB) - Help :XH3.Value for library (&LI) (LIB) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Library' (&LI).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: OBJ (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/OBJ'. Value for object (&OB) (OBJ) - Help :XH3.Value for object (&OB) (OBJ) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Object' (&OB).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: TYPECODE (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/TYPECODE'. Value for type code (&TY) (TYPECODE) - Help :XH3.Value for type code (&TY) (TYPECODE) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Type Code' (&TY).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: SRCLIB (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/SRCLIB'. Value for source library (&SL) (SRCLIB) - Help :XH3.Value for source library (&SL) (SRCLIB) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Source Library' (&SL).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: SRCFILE (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/SRCFILE'. Value for source file (&SF) (SRCFILE) - Help :XH3.Value for source file (&SF) (SRCFILE) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Source File' (&SF).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: SRCMBR (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/SRCMBR'. Value for source member (&SM) (SRCMBR) - Help :XH3.Value for source member (&SM) (SRCMBR) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Source Member' (&SM).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: TESTLIB (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/TESTLIB'. Value for test library (&TL) (TESTLIB) - Help :XH3.Value for test library (&TL) (TESTLIB) :P. Value for the replacement variable 'Test Library' (&TL).
:IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'.
:EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: TESTOBJ (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/TESTOBJ'. :EHELP.
.******************************************** .* Keyword: TGTRLS (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/TGTRLS'. .******************************************** .* Keyword: FRMSRCLIB (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/FRMSRCLIB'. :EHELP.

.******************************************** .* Keyword: USER5 (optional) .******************************************** :HELP NAME='RUNCLSTM/USER5'. Select whether the SQL naming convention or the system naming convention is to be used. :IMHELP name='COM/OPTPARM'. :P. :IMHELP name='COM/VALUES'.
:PARML. :PT.:PK DEF.*SYS:EPK. :PD.The system naming convention will be used. :PT.:PV.*SQL:EPV. :PD.The SQL naming convention will be used. :EPARML.
:EHELP.

P B * D p_main... i_xUser8 value like(userdef_t ) D i_xUser9 value like(userdef_t ) D i_xMsgF value like(msg_t_file) D i_xNaming value like(naming_t ) * D cmdString S like(capcmd_t ) D inz D errMsg E DS extname(XDMSG ) inz D prefix(errMsg_ ) * D rplVarData DS likeds(rplVarData_t) inz * D qFile E DS extname(XDQOBJ ) inz D prefix(qFile_ ) D clCmdString S 256A D diagMsg E DS extname(XDMSG ) inz D prefix(diagMsg_ ) D mode S 10A inz D srcSeq S like(srcSeq_t ) inz D cmdToken S like(cmdToken_t) D errCode E DS extname(xderrcode ) inz D prefix(errCode_ ) * *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Eval qFile = i_qFile * * Laden Werte fÃ¼r Ersatzvariablen C Eval rplVarData.xLib = i_xLib C Eval rplVarData.xObj = i_xObj C Eval rplVarData.xTypeCode = i_xTypeCode C Eval rplVarData.xSrcLib = i_xSrcLib C Eval rplVarData.xSrcFile = i_xSrcFile C Eval rplVarData.xSrcMbr = i_xSrcMbr C Eval rplVarData.xTestLib = i_xTestLib C Eval rplVarData.xTestObj = i_xTestObj C Eval rplVarData.xTgtRls = i_xTgtRls C Eval rplVarData.xFrmSrcLib = i_xFrmSrcLib C Eval rplVarData.xFrmSrcFile = i_xFrmSrcFile C Eval rplVarData.xFrmSrcMbr = i_xFrmSrcMbr C Eval rplVarData.xUser0 = i_xUser0 C Eval rplVarData.xUser1 = i_xUser1 C Eval rplVarData.xUser2 = i_xUser2 C Eval rplVarData.xUser3 = i_xUser3 C Eval rplVarData.xUser4 = i_xUser4 C Eval rplVarData.xUser5 = i_xUser5 C Eval rplVarData.xUser6 = i_xUser6 C Eval rplVarData.xUser7 = i_xUser7 C Eval rplVarData.xUser8 = i_xUser8 C Eval rplVarData.xUser9 = i_xUser9 * * Setzen der Nachrichtendatei C Callp p_setMsgFile(i_xMsgF: '*LIBL') * * Wenn die Bibliothek nicht existiert, ... C If (qFile_lib <> '*LIBL ') and C (qFile_lib <> '*CURLIB') C If not f_exist(qFile_lib : *omit : C '*LIB' : *omit : errMsg) * ... dann * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif C Endif * * Wenn die Datei nicht existiert, ... C If not f_exist(qFile_name : qFile_lib : C '*FILE' : *omit : errMsg) * ... dann * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * * Wenn die Teildatei nicht existiert, ... C If not f_exist(qFile_name : qFile_lib : C '*FILE' : i_mbr : errMsg) * ... dann * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * * Wenn die Datei nicht Ã¼berschreiben werden kann, ... C Eval clCmdString = 'OVRDBF FILE(' + C 'SCRIPT' + C ') ' + C 'TOFILE(' + C %trim(qFile_lib) + C '/' + C %trim(qFile_name) + C ') ' + C 'MBR(' + C %trim(i_mbr) + C ') ' + C 'OVRSCOPE(' + C '*ACTGRPDFN' + C ')' C If not f_execute(clCmdString: errMsg) * ... dann * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * * Setzen Betriebsmodus ... C Eval mode = cCLP * * Lesen und verarbeiten Skript ... C Open SCRIPT C Eval errCode = f_newErrCode(cErr_NoMonErr) C Callp p_rmvPgmMsg('*': 0: '':'*ALL': errCode) * C DoW f_getCmd(cmdString: i_strSeq: i_endSeq) * * Entfernen Remarks ... C Eval cmdString = f_rmvRemCl(cmdString) C If %trim(cmdString) = '' C Iter C Endif * * Ãberlesen MONMSG ... C Callp f_rtvCmdToken(cmdString : C cmdToken ) C If f_ucase(cmdToken) = 'MONMSG' C Iter C Endif * * Ãberlesen PGM ... C Callp f_rtvCmdToken(cmdString : C cmdToken ) C If f_ucase(cmdToken) = 'PGM' C Iter C Endif * * Ãberlesen DCL ... C Callp f_rtvCmdToken(cmdString : C cmdToken ) C If f_ucase(cmdToken) = 'DCL' C Iter C Endif * * Ãberlesen ENDPGM ... C Callp f_rtvCmdToken(cmdString : C cmdToken ) C If f_ucase(cmdToken) = 'ENDPGM' C Iter C Endif * * PrÃ¼fen Betriebsartenumschaltung auf ... * ... starten SQL C If cmdString = cBeginSQL * Wenn die Betriebsart SQL bereits eingestellt ist, ... C If mode = cSQL * ... dann * ausgeben Diagnose Nachricht C Clear USR0002 C Eval USR00021 = ds_srcSeq C Eval USR00022 = cmdString C Eval diagMsg = f_newMsg('USR0002' : C cMsg_TypDiag : C USR0002 ) C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(diagMsg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Clear USR0003 C Eval USR00031 = cSQL C Eval USR00032 = cBeginSQL C Eval USR00033 = cEndSQL C Eval errMsg = f_newMsg('USR0003' : C cMsg_TypEscape : C USR0003 ) C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Else * ... sonst * umschalten auf SQL-Modus C Eval mode = cSQL C Iter C Endif C Endif * * ... beenden SQL C If cmdString = cEndSQL * Wenn die Betriebsart CLP bereits eingestellt ist, ... C If mode = cCLP * ... dann * ausgeben Diagnose Nachricht C Clear USR0002 C Eval USR00021 = ds_srcSeq C Eval USR00022 = cmdString C Eval diagMsg = f_newMsg('USR0002' : C cMsg_TypDiag : C USR0002 ) C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(diagMsg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Clear USR0004 C Eval USR00041 = cCLP C Eval USR00042 = cEndSQL C Eval USR00043 = cBeginSQL C Eval errMsg = f_newMsg('USR0004' : C cMsg_TypEscape : C USR0004 ) C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Else * ... sonst * umschalten auf SQL-Modus C Eval mode = cCLP C Iter C Endif C Endif * * Ersetzen Variablen ... C Eval cmdString = f_rplVars(cmdString: rplVarData) * * AusfÃ¼hren ... C Select * ... CL-Befehl C When mode = cCLP C Eval srcSeq = ds_srcSeq C If not f_execute(cmdString: errMsg) and C not f_monMsg(errMsg_ID : i_strSeq: i_endSeq: C rplVarData) * ... dann * ausgeben Diagnose-Nachricht C Clear USR0002 C Eval USR00021 = srcSeq C Eval USR00022 = cmdString C Eval diagMsg = f_newMsg('USR0002' : C cMsg_TypDiag : C USR0002 ) C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(diagMsg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * ... SQL-Anweisung C When mode = cSQL C Eval srcSeq = ds_srcSeq C If not g_isSqlOpn and C not f_opnSql(i_xNaming: diagMsg) C Eval g_isSqlOpn = cFalse * senden Diagnose Nachricht C Eval diagMsg = f_newMsg(diagMsg_ID : C cMsg_TypDiag : C diagMsg_data ) C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(diagMsg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Else C Eval g_isSqlOpn = cTrue C Endif * C If not f_executeSQL(cmdString: errMsg) and C not f_monMsg(errMsg_ID : i_strSeq:i_endSeq: C rplVarData) * ... dann * ausgeben Diagnose-Nachricht C Clear USR0002 C Eval USR00021 = srcSeq C Eval USR00022 = cmdString C Eval diagMsg = f_newMsg('USR0002' : C cMsg_TypDiag : C USR0002 ) C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(diagMsg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Eval errMsg = f_newMsg('CPF9898' : C cMsg_TypEscape : C errMsg_data : C 'QCPFMSG' : C '*LIBL' ) C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * ... ungÃ¼ltiger Modus C Other C Endsl * C Enddo * C Close SCRIPT * C If g_isSqlOpn C Callp p_cloSql C Eval g_isSqlOpn = cFalse C Endif * * Wenn die Ãberschreibungen nicht gelÃ¶scht werden kÃ¶nnen, ... C Eval clCmdString = 'DLTOVR FILE(' + C 'SCRIPT' + C ') ' + C 'LVL(' + C '*ACTGRPDFN' + C ')' * C If not f_execute(clCmdString: errMsg) * ... dann * beenden mit Fehlermeldung C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * C Return * P p_main... P E * *===============================================================* * Get Command From CL-Script *===============================================================* P f_getCmd... P B * D f_getCmd... D PI like(bool_t ) D io_cmdString like(capcmd_t ) D i_strSeq value like(srcSeq_t ) D i_endSeq value like(srcSeq_t ) * D concat S 1A inz * D isOK S like(bool_t ) inz(cFalse) D cmdString S 32767A varying inz * *--------------------------------------------------------------- * * Initialisierung C Eval cmdString = '' C Eval concat = '+' * C Eval isOK = cTrue * * Lesen, bis das Ende des Befehls erreicht wird ... C Do *HIVAL C Read SCRIPT ds_script C If %eof(SCRIPT) C Eval isOK = cFalse C Leave C Endif * * ... lesen, bis Endezeile erreicht ist C If ds_srcSeq > i_endSeq C Iter C Endif * * ... Ã¼berlesen, bis Startzeile gefunden ist C If ds_srcSeq < i_strSeq C Iter C Endif * * ... zusammenbauen Befehl C Select C When concat = '+' C Eval cmdString = cmdString + %triml(ds_srcDta) C When concat = '-' C Eval cmdString = cmdString + ds_srcDta C Other R *** C Endsl * * ... prÃ¼fen auf Fortsetzungszeile C Eval cmdString = %trimr(cmdString) * * ... prÃ¼fen auf Leerstring C If %len(cmdString) = 0 C Iter C Endif * C Select C When f_right(cmdString: 1) = '+' C Eval concat = '+' C When f_right(cmdString: 1) = '-' C Eval concat = '-' C Other C Eval concat = ' ' C Endsl * * ... Wenn keine Fortsetzungszeile erwartet wird, ... C If concat = ' ' * ... dann * beenden Verarbeitung C Leave C Else * ... sonst * abschneiden Fortsetzungszeichen C Eval cmdString = %subst(cmdString: 1: C %len(cmdString) - 1) C Endif * C Enddo * C Eval io_cmdString = %triml(cmdString) * C Return isOK * P f_getCmd... P E * *===============================================================* * Replace variables *===============================================================* P p_replace... P B * D p_replace... D PI D io_string like(capcmd_t ) D i_var 10A value D i_value 256A value * D x S like(int4_t ) D inz *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Eval x = 0 * C DoU x = 0 * C If x > 0 C Eval io_string = %replace(%trim(i_value) : C io_string : C x : C %len(%trim(i_var))) C Endif * C Eval x = %scan(%trim(i_var) : C io_string ) C Enddo * C Return * P p_replace... P E * *===============================================================* * Monitor Message *===============================================================* P f_monMsg... P B * D f_monMsg... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_msgID value like(msg_t_id ) D i_strSeq value like(srcSeq_t ) D i_endSeq value like(srcSeq_t ) D i_rplVarData value likeds(rplVarData_t) * * Deklarieren Funktionswert D isMonitored S like(bool_t ) inz(cFalse) * * Arbeitsfelder D cmdString S like(capcmd_t ) D msgIdStr S like(capcmd_t ) D cmdToken S like(cmdToken_t) D x S like(int4_t ) D pToken S * inz *--------------------------------------------------------------- * * Vorbelegen "isMonitored" mit "Nein" C Eval isMonitored = cFalse * C DoW f_getCmd(cmdString: i_strSeq: i_endSeq) * * Entfernen Remarks ... C Eval cmdString = f_rmvRemCl(cmdString) C If %trim(cmdString) = '' C Iter C Endif * * Ersetzen Variablen C Eval cmdString = f_rplVars(cmdString : C i_rplVarData) * C Eval cmdString = %trim(cmdString) * C If (cmdString = cBeginSQL) or C (cmdString = cEndSQL ) C Leave C Endif * C Eval cmdString = f_fmtCmd(cmdString) C Callp f_rtvCmdToken(cmdString: cmdToken) C If cmdToken <> 'MONMSG' C Leave C Endif * C If f_rtvCmdParm(cmdString: msgIdStr) * * Extrahieren Daten des SchlÃ¼sselworts MSGID C Eval msgIdStr = C f_rtvKeyWrdDta(f_rtvKeyWrd('MSGID':msgIdStr)) * C If msgIdStr <> '' C Eval pToken = f_getToken(msgIdStr: ' ') * C Dow (pToken <> *null ) and C (isMonitored = cFalse) C If f_cmpMonMsgId(%str(pToken): i_msgId) C Eval isMonitored = cTrue C Endif C Eval pToken = f_getToken(*null: ' ') C Enddo * C Endif C Endif * C If isMonitored C Leave C Endif C Enddo * C Return isMonitored * P f_monMsg... P E * *===============================================================* * Ermitteln Befehls-Token (OS/400 Befehl) *===============================================================* P f_rtvCmdToken... P B * D f_rtvCmdToken... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_cmdString value like(capcmd_t ) D o_cmdToken like(cmdToken_t) * * Deklarieren Funktionswert D isToken S like(bool_t ) inz * * Arbeitsfelder D x S like(int4_t ) inz D cmdString S like(capcmd_t ) inz D cmdToken S like(cmdToken_t) inz *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Eval cmdString = %triml(i_cmdString) * C Eval x = %scan(' ': cmdString) C Eval x = x - 1 * C If (x > %len(cmdToken)) or C (x <= 0 ) C Eval isToken = cFalse C Else C Eval cmdToken = %subst(cmdString: 1: x) C If f_right(%trimr(cmdToken): 1) = ':' C Eval isToken = cFalse C Else C Eval isToken = cTrue C Endif C Endif * C If isToken C Eval o_cmdToken = cmdToken C Else C Eval o_cmdToken = ' ' C Endif * C Return isToken * P f_rtvCmdToken... P E * *===============================================================* * Ermitteln Befehls-Parameter *===============================================================* P f_rtvCmdParm... P B * D f_rtvCmdParm... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_cmdString value like(capcmd_t ) D o_cmdParm like(capcmd_t ) * * Deklarieren Funktionswert D isParm S like(bool_t ) inz * * Arbeitsfelder D x S like(int4_t ) inz D cmdString S like(capcmd_t ) inz *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Eval cmdString = %triml(i_cmdString) * C Eval x = %scan(' ': cmdString) * C If (x > %len(o_cmdParm)) or C (x <= 0 ) C Eval o_cmdParm = '' C Eval isParm = cFalse C Else C Eval o_cmdParm = %triml(%subst(cmdString: x)) C Eval isParm = cTrue C Endif * C Return isParm * P f_rtvCmdParm... P E * * ============================================================= * Extrahieren BefehlsschlÃ¼sselwort * ============================================================= P f_rtvKeyWrd... P B * D f_rtvKeyWrd... D PI like(capcmd_t ) D i_keyWrd 10A value D i_cmd value like(capcmd_t ) * * Funktionswert D keyWrdStr S like(capcmd_t ) inz * * Arbeitsfelder D startPos S like(int4_t ) inz D dataLen S like(int4_t ) inz D x S like(int4_t ) inz D y S like(int4_t ) inz D token S 11A varying inz D endPos S like(int4_t ) inz D numBracket S like(int4_t ) inz * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - * C Eval token = %trim(i_keyWrd) + '(' * * suchen SchlÃ¼sselwort im vorhandenen Befehlstring C Eval startPos = %scan(token: i_cmd) * * Wenn das SchlÃ¼sselwort gefunden werden konnte, ... C If startPos > 0 * ... dann * ermitteln LÃ¤nge des SchlÃ¼sselwortes ... C Eval x = startPos + %len(token) C Eval numBracket = 1 C Eval dataLen = %len(token) C Eval endPos = %len(%trimr(i_cmd)) * C x Do endPos y * C Eval DataLen = DataLen + 1 * ... '(' C If %subst(i_cmd: y: 1) = '(' C Eval numBracket = numBracket + 1 C Iter C Endif * ... ')' C If %subst(i_cmd: y: 1) = ')' C Eval numBracket = numBracket - 1 C Iter C Endif * ... gefunden C If numBracket <= 0 C Leave C Endif * C Enddo * * Wenn der KlammernzÃ¤hler <> 0 ist, ... C If numBracket <> 0 * ... dann * konnte das Ende des SchlÃ¼sselwortes * nicht gefunden werden C Eval keyWrdStr = '' C Else C Eval keyWrdStr = %subst(i_cmd: startPos: dataLen) C Endif * C Else C Eval keyWrdStr = '' C Endif * C Return keyWrdStr * P f_rtvKeyWrd... P E * * ============================================================= * Extrahieren BefehlsschlÃ¼sselwort Daten * ============================================================= P f_rtvKeyWrdDta... P B * D f_rtvKeyWrdDta... D PI like(capcmd_t ) D i_keyWrd value like(capcmd_t ) * * Funktionswert D keyWrdDta S like(capcmd_t ) inz * * Arbeitsfelder D startPos S like(int4_t ) inz D dataLen S like(int4_t ) inz D x S like(int4_t ) inz D y S like(int4_t ) inz D token S 11A varying inz D endPos S like(int4_t ) inz D numBracket S like(int4_t ) inz * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - * C Eval token = '(' * * suchen SchlÃ¼sselwortdaten im vorhandenen Befehlstring C Eval startPos = %scan(token: i_keyWrd) * * Wenn das SchlÃ¼sselwort gefunden werden konnte, ... C If (startPos > 0) and C (f_right(%trimr(i_keyWrd): 1) = ')') * ... dann * ermitteln LÃ¤nge des SchlÃ¼sselwortes ... C Eval startPos = startPos + %len(token) C Eval endPos = %len(%trimr(i_keyWrd)) - 1 C Eval dataLen = endPos - startPos + 1 * C Eval keyWrdDta = C %subst(i_keyWrd: startPos: dataLen) C Else C Eval keyWrdDta = '' C Endif * C Return keyWrdDta * P f_rtvKeyWrdDta... P E * * ============================================================= * Konvertieren in Grossbuchstaben * ============================================================= P f_ucase... P B * D f_ucase... D PI 2048A D i_lower 2048A value * * Funktionswert D upper S 2048A inz * * Konvertierungstabellen D lc C const('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz') D uc C const('ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ') * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - * C lc:uc Xlate i_lower upper * C Return upper * P f_ucase... P E * * ============================================================= * Ersetzen Variablen * ============================================================= P f_rplVars... P B * D f_rplVars... D PI like(capcmd_t ) D i_cmdString value like(capcmd_t ) D i_rplVarData value likeds(rplVarData_t) * * Funktionswert D cmdString S like(capcmd_t ) inz * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - * C Eval cmdString = i_cmdString * * Ersetzen Lib (&LI) C If i_rplVarData.xLib <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&LI': i_rplVarData.xLib) C Endif * * Ersetzen Objekt (&OB) C If i_rplVarData.xObj <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&OB': i_rplVarData.xObj) C Endif * * Ersetzen Type Code (&TY) C If i_rplVarData.xTypeCode <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&TY': i_rplVarData.xTypeCode) C Endif * * Ersetzen Source Lib (&SL) C If i_rplVarData.xSrcLib <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&SL': i_rplVarData.xSrcLib) C Endif * * Ersetzen Source File (&SF) C If i_rplVarData.xSrcFile <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&SF': i_rplVarData.xSrcFile) C Endif * * Ersetzen Source Mbr (&SM) C If i_rplVarData.xSrcMbr <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&SM': i_rplVarData.xSrcMbr) C Endif * * Ersetzen Test Lib (&TL) C If i_rplVarData.xTestLib <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&TL': i_rplVarData.xTestLib) C Endif * * Ersetzen Test Object (&TO) C If i_rplVarData.xTestObj <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&TO': i_rplVarData.xTestObj) C Endif * * Ersetzen Taget Rel. (&TO) C If i_rplVarData.xTgtRls <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&TR': i_rplVarData.xTgtRls) C Endif * * Ersetzen From Src Lib (&SL) C If i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcLib <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&FL': i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcLib) C Endif * * Ersetzen From Src File (&SF) C If i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcFile <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&FF': i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcFile) C Endif * * Ersetzen From Src Mbr (&SM) C If i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcMbr <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&FM': i_rplVarData.xFrmSrcMbr) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER0) C If i_rplVarData.xUser0 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U0': i_rplVarData.xUser0) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER1) C If i_rplVarData.xUser1 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U1': i_rplVarData.xUser1) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER2) C If i_rplVarData.xUser2 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U2': i_rplVarData.xUser2) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER3) C If i_rplVarData.xUser3 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U3': i_rplVarData.xUser3) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER4) C If i_rplVarData.xUser4 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U4': i_rplVarData.xUser4) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER5) C If i_rplVarData.xUser5 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U5': i_rplVarData.xUser5) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER6) C If i_rplVarData.xUser6 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U6': i_rplVarData.xUser6) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER7) C If i_rplVarData.xUser7 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U7': i_rplVarData.xUser7) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER8) C If i_rplVarData.xUser8 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U8': i_rplVarData.xUser8) C Endif * * Ersetzen Parameter (&USER9) C If i_rplVarData.xUser9 <> cNONE C Callp p_replace(cmdString: C '&U9': i_rplVarData.xUser9) C Endif * C Return cmdString * P f_rplVars... P E * * ============================================================= * Abnormal End Procedure * ============================================================= P p_abnEndProc... P B * D p_abnEndProc... D PI D i_token * const * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - * C If g_isSqlOpn C Callp p_cloSql C Eval g_isSqlOpn = cFalse C Endif * C Return * P p_abnEndProc... P E *
