mbr.copysrc: * =================================================================== * * * * Kurzdokumentation : * * * * Bereich . . . : RUNCLSTM * * Objekt . . . : RUNCLSTMS1 * * Beschreibung : Tool: RUNCLSTM (Run CL Statements ) * * Author . . . : Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> * * Datum . . . . : 03.08.2000 * * * * =================================================================== * * * * This software is free software, you can redistribute it and/or * * modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) * * as published by the Free Software Foundation. * * * * See GNU General Public License for details. * * http://www.opensource.org * * http://www.opensource.org/licenses/gpl-license.html * * * *=====================================================================* * History: * * * * Datum Name Ãnderung * * ---------- ------------ --------------------------------------- * * * * =================================================================== * * >>PRE-COMPILER<< * * * * >>CRTCMD<< CRTRPGMOD MODULE(&LI/&OB) + * * SRCFILE(&SL/&SF) + * * SRCMBR(&SM); * * * * >>COMPILE<< * * >>PARM<< TRUNCNBR(*NO); * * >>PARM<< DBGVIEW(*LIST); * * >>END-COMPILE<< * * * * >>EXECUTE<< * * * * >>END-PRE-COMPILER<< * * =================================================================== * H NOMAIN /COPY QRUNCLSTM,COPYRIGHT * =================================================================== * * /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG3 * D cBegClRem C const('/*') D cLenBegClRem C const(2) D cEndClRem C const('*/') D cLenEndClRem C const(2) * D cBegLit C const('''') D cLenBegLit C const(1) D cEndLit C const('''') D cLenEndLit C const(1) * *===============================================================* * Nachrichten *===============================================================* /COPY QRUNCLSTM,USR0001 * *===============================================================* * Public Prototypes *===============================================================* /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG1 /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG2 * *===============================================================* * Private Prototypes *===============================================================* D f_subst... D PR 32767A varying D str 32767A value varying D pos value like(int4_t ) D lenToken value like(int4_t ) * * global variables D g_msgF S like(msg_t_file) D g_msgFLib S like(msg_t_lib ) *===============================================================* * Get Command From CL-Script *===============================================================* P f_execute... P B export * D f_execute... D PI opdesc like(bool_t ) D i_cmd const like(capcmd_t ) D options(*varsize) D o_msg like(msg_t ) D options(*nopass: *omit) D i_typCmdPrc const like(int4_t ) D options(*nopass) * * Definieren Funktionswert D isOK S like(bool_t ) D inz * * Definieren Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optinale Parametergruppe 1 D o1_msg S like(msg_t ) D inz * * Definieren Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optinale Parametergruppe 2 D i2_typCmdPrc S 10I 0 inz * * Definieren Parameter fÃ¼r p_getOpDesc D posNr S inz like(int4_t ) D descType S inz like(int4_t ) D datatype S inz like(int4_t ) D descInf1 S inz like(int4_t ) D descInf2 S inz like(int4_t ) D dataLen S inz like(int4_t ) D feedBack S inz like(fc_t ) * * Definitionen fÃ¼r QCAPCMD D cmd S like(i_cmd) D cmdLen S 10I 0 inz D optCtrl DS D typCmdPrc 1 4B 0 inz D DBCS_Data 5 5A inz('0') ignore DBCS D prmt_Act 6 6A inz('2') selective prom D cmdStrSntx 7 7A inz('0') AS/400 Syntax D msgRtvKey 8 11A inz(*BLANKS) no retrieve ke D res_01 12 20A inz(*ALLx'00') D optCtrlLen S 10I 0 inz(%len(OptCtrl)) D optCtrlFmt S 8A inz('CPOP0100') D retCmd S like(i_cmd) D inz D retCmdLenAvl S 10I 0 inz D retCmdLenRtn S 10I 0 inz D errCode S like(errCode_t ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r Funktion: p_TestOmit D isPresent S like(int4_t ) D inz * *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Callp p_getOpDesc(1: descType: dataType: C descInf1: descInf2: C dataLen: feedBack) * C Eval cmd = %subst(i_cmd: 1: dataLen) C Eval cmdLen = %len(cmd) C Eval retCmd = '' C Eval retCmdLenAvl = %len(retCmd) * C If %parms >= 2 C Eval errCode = f_newErrCode(cErr_MonErr) C Else C Eval errCode = f_newErrCode(cErr_NoMonErr) C Endif * C Eval i2_typCmdPrc = 2 * C If %parms >= 3 C CallP p_TestOmit(isPresent: 3: *omit) C If isPresent = 1 C Eval i2_typCmdPrc = i_typCmdPrc C Endif C Endif * C Call (E) 'QCAPCMD' C Parm cmd C Parm cmdLen C Parm optCtrl C Parm optCtrlLen C Parm optCtrlFmt C Parm retCmd C Parm retCmdLenAvl C Parm retCmdLenRtn C Parm errCode * C Eval o1_msg = f_getAPIErrMsg(errCode) * * eintragen RÃ¼ckgabeparameter ... C If %parms >= 2 C Eval o_msg = o1_msg C Endif * * fÃ¼llen Funktionswert ... C If f_isAPIErr(errCode) C Eval isOK = cFalse C Else C Eval isOK = cTrue C Endif * C Return isOK * P f_execute... P E * *===============================================================* * Create New Error Code *===============================================================* P f_newErrCode... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_newErrCode... D PI like(errCode_t ) D i_monErr value like(bool_t ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D errCode E DS extname(XDERRCODE ) inz D prefix(errCode_ ) * * Definieren lokale Arbeitsfelder *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Clear errCode * C If (i_monErr = cTrue) C Eval errCode_bytPrv = %size(errCode) C Else C Eval errCode_bytPrv = 0 C Endif * C Return errCode * P f_newErrCode... P E * *===============================================================* * Prozedur: f_getAPIErrMsg *===============================================================* P f_getAPIErrMsg... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_getAPIErrMsg... D PI like(msg_t ) D i_errCode value like(errCode_t ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D apiErrMsg S like(msg_t ) inz * * Definieren lokale Arbeitsfelder D errCode E DS extname(XDERRCODE ) inz D prefix(errCode_ ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * * ermÃ¶glichen Zugriff auf Einzelfelder von i_errCode C Eval errCode = i_errCode * C If f_isAPIErr(errCode) C Eval apiErrMsg = f_newMsg(errCode_excID : C cMsg_TypEscape : C errCode_excDta : C 'QCPFMSG' : C '*LIBL' ) C Else C Eval apiErrMsg = f_newMsg(' ') C Endif * C Return apiErrMsg * P f_getAPIErrMsg... P E * *===============================================================* * Test for API error *===============================================================* P f_isAPIErr... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_isAPIErr... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_errCode value like(errCode_t ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D isAPIErr S like(msg_t ) inz * * Definieren lokale Arbeitsfelder D errCode E DS extname(XDERRCODE ) inz D prefix(errCode_ ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * * ermÃ¶glichen Zugriff auf Einzelfelder von i_errCode C Eval errCode = i_errCode * C If errCode_bytAvl <> 0 C Eval isAPIErr = cTrue C Else C Eval isAPIErr = cFalse C Endif * C Return isAPIErr * P f_isAPIErr... P E * *===============================================================* * Prozedur: f_newMsg *===============================================================* P f_newMsg... P B export * D f_newMsg... D PI like(msg_t ) D i_msgID value like(msg_t_ID ) * optionale Parametergruppe 1 D i_msgType value like(msg_t_type) D options(*NOPASS) * optionale Parametergruppe 2 D i_msgData const like(msg_t_data) D options(*NOPASS: *OMIT) * optionale Parametergruppe 3 D i_msgF value like(msg_t_file ) D options(*NOPASS) * optionale Parametergruppe 4 D i_msgL value like(msg_t_lib ) D options(*NOPASS) * * Definieren Funktionswert D msg E DS extname(XDMSG ) inz D prefix(msg_ ) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 1 D i1_msgType S like(i_msgType ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 2 D i2_msgData S like(I_MsgData ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 3 D i3_msgF S like(I_MsgF ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 4 D i4_msgL S like(I_MsgL ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r Funktion: p_TestOmit D isPresent S like(int4_t ) D inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * * ... MsgType C IF (%parms < 2) C Eval i1_msgType = '*INFO' C ELSE C Eval i1_msgType = i_msgType C Endif * * ... MsgData * C IF (%parms < 3) C Eval I2_MsgData = ' ' C ELSE C CallP p_TestOmit(isPresent: 3: *omit) C IF (isPresent = 0) C Eval I2_MsgData = ' ' C ELSE C Eval I2_MsgData = I_MsgData C Endif C Endif * * ... MsgF C IF (%parms < 4) C Eval I3_MsgF = f_getMsgFile C ELSE C Eval I3_MsgF = I_MsgF C Endif * * ... MsgL C IF (%parms < 5) C Eval I4_MsgL = f_getMsgFileLib C ELSE C Eval I4_MsgL = I_MsgL C Endif * * Erstellen Nachricht ... C Clear msg * C If i_msgID <> '' * ... MsgID C Eval msg_ID = i_msgID * ... MsgType C Eval msg_type = i1_msgType * ... MsgData C Eval msg_data = i2_msgData * ... MsgF C Eval msg_file = i3_msgF * ... MsgL C Eval msg_lib = i4_msgL C Endif * C Return msg * P f_newMsg... P E * *===============================================================* * Extract from the right side of a string *===============================================================* P f_right... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_right... D PI 32767A varying D i_str 32767A value D varying D i_rLen value like(int4_t) D options(*nopass ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D rightStr S like(string_t ) D inz * * Definieren Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optinale Parametergruppe 1 D i1_rLen S like(int4_t ) D inz * * Lokale Hilfsfelder D errMsg E DS extname(xdmsg ) inz D prefix(errMsg_ ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C If %parms >= 2 C Eval i1_rLen = i_rLen C Else C Eval i1_rLen = %len(i_str) C Endif * C If %len(i_str) - i1_rLen >= 0 C Eval rightStr = %subst(i_str: C %len(i_str) - i1_rLen + 1) C Else C Eval errMsg = f_newMsg('USR0001' : C cMsg_TypEscape ) C Callp p_endPgmAbn(errMsg) C Endif * C Return rightStr * P f_right... P E * *===============================================================* * Remove Remarks from CL String *===============================================================* P f_rmvRemCl... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_rmvRemCl... D PI 32767A varying D i_clStr 32767A value D varying * * Definieren Funktionswert D newClStr S 32767A varying D inz('') * * Lokale Arbeitsfelder D testChr S 32767A varying D inz('') D isClRem S like(bool_t ) D inz(cFalse) D isLiteral S like(bool_t ) D inz(cFalse) D x S like(int4_t ) D inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Eval x = 1 C Eval newClStr = %trim(i_clStr) * C DoW x < %len(newClStr) * * Wenn wir uns nicht innerhalb eines Remark befinden, ... C If not isClRem * ... dann * PrÃ¼fen auf Anfang Literalzeichen C If f_subst(newClStr: x: cLenBegLit) = cBegLit C Eval isLiteral = cTrue C Eval x = x + cLenBegLit C Iter C Endif * * PrÃ¼fen auf Ende Literalzeichen C If f_subst(newClStr: x: cLenEndLit) = cEndLit C Eval isLiteral = cTrue C Eval x = x + cLenEndLit C Iter C Endif C Endif * * Wenn wir uns nicht innerhalb eines Literals befinden, ... C If not isLiteral * ... dann * PrÃ¼fen auf Anfang eines Remarks C If f_subst(newClStr: x: cLenBegClRem)= cBegClRem C If (x = 1) or C (%subst(newClStr: x - 1: 1) = ' ') C Eval isClRem = cTrue C Eval %subst(newClStr: x: cLenBegClRem) = '' C Eval x = x + cLenBegClRem C Iter C Endif C Endif * * PrÃ¼fen auf Ende eines Remarks C If f_subst(newClStr: x: cLenEndClRem)= cEndClRem C If (x = %len(newClStr) - cLenEndClRem + 1) or C (%subst(newClStr: x + cLenEndClRem: 1) = ' ') C Eval isClRem = cFalse C Eval %subst(newClStr: x: cLenEndClRem) = '' C Eval x = x + cLenEndClRem C Iter C Endif C Endif C Endif * * ... ausblenden Remarks C If isClRem C Eval %subst(newClStr: x: 1) = '' C Endif * C Eval x = x + 1 C Enddo * C Return %trim(newClStr) * P f_rmvRemCl... P E * * ============================================================= * Formatieren CL Befehl * ============================================================= P f_fmtCmd... P B export * D f_fmtCmd... D PI like(capcmd_t ) D i_cmd value like(capcmd_t ) * * Definitionen fÃ¼r QCAPCMD D cmd S like(i_cmd) D cmdLen S 10I 0 inz(%len(cmd)) D optCtrl DS D typCmdPrc 1 4B 0 inz(4) cl commands D DBCS_Data 5 5A inz('1') handle DBCS D prmt_Act 6 6A inz('0') never prompt D cmdStrSntx 7 7A inz('0') AS/400 Syntax D msgRtvKey 8 11A inz(*BLANKS) no retrieve ke D res_01 12 20A inz(*ALLx'00') D optCtrlLen S 10I 0 inz(%len(OptCtrl)) D optCtrlFmt S 8A inz('CPOP0100') D retCmd S like(i_cmd) inz D retCmdLenAvl S 10I 0 inz(%len(retCmd)) D retCmdLenRtn S 10I 0 inz D errCode DS D errBytPrv 10I 0 inz(%size(errCode)) D errBytAvl 10I 0 inz D errID 7A inz D errRes01 1A inz D errDta 256A inz * - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - C Reset errCode * C Eval cmd = i_cmd * C Call (E) 'QCAPCMD' C Parm cmd C Parm cmdLen C Parm optCtrl C Parm optCtrlLen C Parm optCtrlFmt C Parm retCmd C Parm retCmdLenAvl C Parm retCmdLenRtn C Parm errCode * * PrÃ¼fen API-Fehler ... C If f_isAPIErr(errCode) C Eval retCmd = '' C Else * * PrÃ¼fen LÃ¤nge der Befehlszeichenkette ... C If retCmdLenRtn > retCmdLenAvl C Eval retCmd = '' C Endif C Endif * C Return retCmd * P f_fmtCmd... P E * *===============================================================* * End Program Abnormal *===============================================================* P p_endPgmAbn... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D p_endPgmAbn... D PI D i_msg value like(msg_t ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Callp p_sndPgmMsg(i_msg : C cMsg_Prv : C cMsg_ToCtlBdy ) * C Return * P p_endPgmAbn... P E * *===============================================================* * Compare generic Message IDs *===============================================================* P f_cmpMonMsgID... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_cmpMonMsgID... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_msgId value like(msg_t_ID ) D i_monMsgId value like(msg_t_ID ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D isEqual S like(bool_t ) inz(cFalse) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C If %subst(i_msgId: 6: 2) = '00' C Eval %subst(i_monMsgId: 6: 2) = '00' C If %subst(i_msgId: 4: 2) = '00' C Eval %subst(i_monMsgId: 4: 2) = '00' C Endif C Endif * C If i_monMsgId = i_msgId C Eval isEqual = cTrue C Else C Eval isEqual = cFalse C Endif * C Return isEqual * P f_cmpMonMsgID... P E * *===============================================================* * Prozedur: p_sndPgmMsg *===============================================================* P p_sndPgmMsg... P B export * D p_sndPgmMsg... D PI D i_msg value like(msg_t ) * optionale Parametergruppe 1 D i_toStkC value like(int4_t ) D options(*NOPASS) * optionale Parametergruppe 2 D i_toProc value like(proc_t ) D options(*NOPASS) * optionale Parametergruppe 3 D i_toMod const like(mod_t ) D options(*NOPASS: *OMIT) * optionale Parametergruppe 4 D i_toPgm value like(pgm_t ) D options(*NOPASS) * * Zerlegung Eingangsparameter I_Msg in Einzelfelder D msg E DS extname(XDMSG ) inz D prefix(msg_ ) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 1 D I1_ToStkC S like(I_ToStkC) INZ(*ZEROS ) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 2 D I2_ToProc S like(I_ToProc ) INZ(*BLANKS) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 3 D I3_ToMod S like(I_ToMod ) INZ(*ZEROS ) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optionale Parametergruppe 4 D I4_ToPgm S like(I_ToPgm) INZ(*BLANKS) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r System-API: CEETSTA D isPresent S like(int4_t) INZ(*ZEROS) * * Parameterfelder fÃ¼r System-API: QMHSNDPM D p1_MsgID S 7A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_DSMsgFObj DS 20 D p1_DSMsgF 1 10A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_DSMsgL 11 20A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_MsgData S like(msg_data ) INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_LenMsgData S like(int4_t ) INZ(*ZEROS ) D p1_MsgType S 10A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_CallStkE S like(I_ToProc ) INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_CallStkCtr S like(int4_t ) INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_MsgKey S 4A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_ErrCode E DS EXTNAME(XDERRCODE) PREFIX(p1_) INZ * Optional Parameter Group 1 D p1_LenCallStkE S like(int4_t) INZ(*ZEROS ) D p1_CallStkEQ DS 20 D p1_CallStkEQM 1 10A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_CallStkEQP 11 20A INZ(*BLANKS) D p1_WaitTime S like(int4_t) INZ(*ZEROS ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * * ErmÃ¶glichen Zugriff auf Einzelfelder ... C Eval msg = i_msg * * Einsetzen der Defaultwerte ... * ... Stackcounter C If %parms < 2 C Eval i1_toStkC = cMsg_Same C Else C Eval i1_toStkC = i_toStkC C Endif * * ... an Prozedur C If (%parms < 3) C Eval i2_toProc = cMsg_toMySelf C Else C Eval i2_toProc = i_toProc C Endif * * ... an Modul C If %parms < 4 C Eval i3_toMod = '*NONE' C Else C Callp p_TestOmit(isPresent: 4 : *omit) C If (isPresent = cCEE_isNotPresent) C Eval i3_toMod = '*NONE' C Else C Eval I3_toMod = i_toMod C Endif C Endif * * ... an Programm C IF %parms < 5 C Eval i4_toPgm = '*NONE' C ELSE C Eval i4_toPgm = i_toPgm C Endif * * FÃ¼llen Parameterfelder fÃ¼r System-API ... * Call Stack Counter ... C Select * ... *EXT C When i1_ToStkC = cMsg_Ext C Eval p1_callStkCtr = 0 C Eval i2_toProc = '*EXT' * ... *PERVIOUS C When i1_toStkC = cMsg_Prv C Eval p1_callStkCtr = 1 * ... *SAME C When i1_toStkC = cMsg_Same C Eval p1_callStkCtr = 0 * ... sonst C Other C Eval p1_callStkCtr = 0 C Endsl * * An Prozedur ... C Select * ... * C When i2_toProc = cMsg_toMySelf C Eval p1_callStkE = '*' * ... eigene Prozedur SndPgmMsg Ã¼berspringen C Eval p1_callStkCtr = p1_callStkCtr + 1 * ... *PGMBDY C When i2_toProc = cMsg_ToPgmBdy C Eval p1_callStkE = '*PGMBDY' * ... *CTLBDY C When i2_toProc = cMsg_ToCtlBdy C Eval p1_callStkE = '*CTLBDY' * ... *PGMNAME C When i2_toProc = cMsg_ToPgm C Eval p1_callStkE = '*PGMNAME' * ... *EXT C When i2_toProc = '*EXT' C Eval p1_callStkE = '*EXT' * ... benannte Prozedur C Other C Eval p1_callStkE = i2_toProc C Endsl * * An Modul ... C Eval p1_CallStkEQM = i3_toMod * * An Programm ... C Eval p1_callStkEQP = i4_toPgm * * Nachrichten ... C Eval p1_msgID = msg_ID C Eval p1_msgData = msg_data C Eval p1_lenMsgData = %size(p1_msgData) * C Select * ... Anwendung-Information C When msg_type = cMsg_AppInfo C Eval p1_msgType = cMsg_TypInfo * ... Anwendung-Warnung C When msg_type = cMsg_AppWarning C Eval p1_msgType = cMsg_TypInfo * ... Anwendung-Fehler C When msg_type = cMsg_AppError C Eval p1_msgType = cMsg_TypInfo C Other C Eval p1_msgType = msg_type C Endsl * C Eval p1_DSMsgF = msg_file C Eval p1_DSMsgL = msg_lib * * NachrichtenschlÃ¼ssel ... C Eval p1_msgKey = '' * Fehlercode ... C Eval p1_errCode = f_newErrCode(cErr_NoMonErr) * * Sonstige Parameter ... C Eval p1_lenCallStkE = %size(p1_CallStkE) C Eval p1_waitTime = -1 * C Call 'QMHSNDPM' C Parm p1_MsgID C Parm p1_DSMsgFObj C Parm p1_MsgData C Parm p1_LenMsgData C Parm p1_MsgType C Parm p1_CallStkE C Parm p1_CallStkCtr C Parm p1_MsgKey C Parm p1_ErrCode C Parm p1_LenCallStkE C Parm p1_CallStkEQ C Parm p1_WaitTime * C Return * P p_sndPgmMsg... P E * *===============================================================* * test if an object exist *===============================================================* P f_exist... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_exist... D PI like(bool_t ) D i_obj const like(obj_t ) D i_lib const like(lib_t ) D options(*omit) D i_objType const like(objType_t ) D i_mbr const like(mbr_t ) D options(*omit) D o_msg like(msg_t ) D options(*nopass) * * Definieren Funktionswert D isOK S like(bool_t ) D inz * * Definieren Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optinale Parametergruppe 1 D i1_lib S like(lib_t ) D inz * * Definieren Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r optinale Parametergruppe 2 D i2_mbr S like(mbr_t ) D inz * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r Funktion: p_TestOmit D isPresent S like(int4_t ) INZ(*ZEROS) * * Lokale Arbeitsfelder D cmdStr S 256A inz D errMsg E DS extname(XDMSG ) inz D prefix(errMsg_ ) * *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Callp p_TestOmit(isPresent: 2 : *omit) C If (isPresent = cCEE_isNotPresent) C Eval i1_lib = '*LIBL' C Else C Eval i1_lib = i_lib C Endif * C Callp p_TestOmit(isPresent: 4 : *omit) C If (isPresent = cCEE_isNotPresent) C Eval i2_mbr = '*NONE' C Else C Eval i2_mbr = i_mbr C Endif * C Eval cmdStr = 'CHKOBJ OBJ(' + C %trim(i1_lib) + C '/' + C %trim(i_obj) + C ') ' + C 'OBJTYPE(' + C %trim(i_objtype) + C ') ' + C 'MBR(' + C %trim(i2_mbr) + C ') ' * C If not f_execute(cmdStr : C errMsg ) C Eval isOK = cFalse C Else C Eval isOK = cTrue C Endif * C If %parms >= 5 C Eval o_msg = errMsg C Endif * C Return isOK * P f_exist... P E * *===============================================================* * Set Message file *===============================================================* P p_setMsgFile... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D p_setMsgFile... D PI D i_msgF value like(msg_t_file) D i_msgFLib value like(msg_t_lib ) *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Eval g_msgF = i_msgF C Eval g_msgFLib = i_msgFLib * P p_setMsgFile... P E * *===============================================================* * Get Message file *===============================================================* P f_getMsgFile... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_getMsgFile... D PI like(msg_t_file) * * Definieren Funktionswert D o_msgF S like(msg_t_file) inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Eval o_msgF = g_msgF * C Return o_msgF * P f_getMsgFile... P E * *===============================================================* * Get Message file library *===============================================================* P f_getMsgFileLib... P B export * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_getMsgFileLib... D PI like(msg_t_lib ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D o_msgFLib S like(msg_t_lib ) inz *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C Eval o_msgFLib = g_msgFLib * C Return o_msgFLib * P f_getMsgFileLib... P E * *===============================================================* * Private: * Get token from string *===============================================================* P f_subst... P B * * Definieren Procedure Interface D f_subst... D PI 32767A varying D str 32767A value varying D pos value like(int4_t ) D lenToken value like(int4_t ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D token S 32767A varying D inz('') *-------------------------------------------------------------------* * C If pos + lenToken - 1 <= %len(str) C Return %subst(str: pos: lenToken) C Else C Return '' C Endif * P f_subst... P E *

mbr.copysrc: * =================================================================== * * * * Kurzdokumentation : * * * * Bereich . . . : RUNCLSTM * * Objekt . . . : RUNCLSTMS2 * * Beschreibung : Tool: RUNCLSTM (Run CL Statements ) * * Author . . . : Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> * * Datum . . . . : 03.08.2000 * * * * =================================================================== * * * * This software is free software, you can redistribute it and/or * * modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) * * as published by the Free Software Foundation. * * * * See GNU General Public License for details. * * http://www.opensource.org * * http://www.opensource.org/licenses/gpl-license.html * * * *=====================================================================* * History: * * * * Datum Name Ãnderung * * ---------- ------------ --------------------------------------- * * 03.05.2002 Th.Raddatz Changed RUNCLSTM to use SQL-CLI. * * 19.06.2002 Th.Raddatz Fixed error in f_sqlErrMsg() to * * get the correct SQL message ID. * * * * =================================================================== * * >>PRE-COMPILER<< * * * * >>CRTCMD<< CRTRPGMOD MODULE(&LI/&OB) + * * SRCFILE(&SL/&SF) + * * SRCMBR(&SM); * * * * >>COMPILE<< * * >>PARM<< TRUNCNBR(*NO); * * >>PARM<< DBGVIEW(*LIST); * * >>END-COMPILE<< * * * * >>EXECUTE<< * * * * >>END-PRE-COMPILER<< * * =================================================================== * H NOMAIN /COPY QRUNCLSTM,COPYRIGHT * =================================================================== * * /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG3 /COPY QRUNCLSTM,SQLCLI * *===============================================================* * Nachrichten *===============================================================* * *===============================================================* * Public Prototypes *===============================================================* /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG1 /COPY QRUNCLSTM,RUNCLSTMG2 * *===============================================================* * Globale Variablen *===============================================================* D g_henv S like(SQLHENV_t ) inz D g_hdbc S like(SQLHDBC_t ) inz D g_hstmt S like(SQLHSTMT_t) inz * *===============================================================* * Public Prototypes *===============================================================* * *===============================================================* * Private Prototypes *===============================================================* * * Is SQL Error D f_isSqlErr PR like(bool_t ) D i_rc value like(SQLRETCODE_t) D o_msg like(msg_t ) * * Get SQL MsgID D f_sqlErrMsg PR like(msg_t ) * *===================================================================* * Prozedur: f_opnSQL (Body) * *===================================================================* * P f_opnSQL B export * * definieren Procedure Interface ... D f_opnSQL PI like(bool_t ) D i_naming const like(naming_t ) D o_msg like(msg_t ) * * definieren Funktionswert ... D f_opnSQL S like(bool_t ) inz * * lokale variablen ... D rc S like(SQLRETCODE_t) inz D connectAttr S like(SQLINTEGER_t) inz D envAttr S like(SQLINTEGER_t) inz * ------------------------------------------------------------------------ * * EXEC SQL CONNECT TO :server USER :uid USING :authentication_string; * ... allocate an environment handle C Eval rc = SQLAllocEnv (%addr(g_henv)) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * * ... change environment attribute to requested naming standard C If i_naming = '*SQL' C Eval envAttr = SQL_FALSE C Else C Eval envAttr = SQL_TRUE C Endif C Eval rc = SQLSetEnvAttr(g_henv : C SQL_ATTR_SYS_NAMING : C %addr(envAttr) : C %size(envAttr) ) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * * ... allocate a connection handle C Eval rc = SQLAllocConnect (g_henv: %addr(g_hdbc)) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * * ... change connection attribute to not use committment control C Eval connectAttr = SQL_TXN_NO_COMMIT C Eval rc = SQLSetConnectAttr(g_hdbc : C SQL_ATTR_COMMIT : C %addr(connectAttr): C %size(connectAttr)) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * * ... connect to database indicated by "server" variable * and current user profile C Eval rc = SQLConnect (g_hdbc : C '*LOCAL': SQL_NTS: C *null : SQL_NTS: C *null : SQL_NTS) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * * ... allocate a statement handle C Eval rc = SQLAllocStmt (g_hdbc: %addr(g_hstmt)) * C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval f_opnSQL = cFalse C Callp p_cloSQL C Goto fkt_ende C Endif * C Eval f_opnSQL = cTrue * C fkt_ende Tag * C Return f_opnSQL * P f_opnSQL E * *===============================================================* * Execute SQL statement *===============================================================* P f_executeSQL... P B export * D f_executeSQL... D PI opdesc like(bool_t ) D i_sqlStmt const like(capCmd_t ) D options(*varsize) D o_msg like(msg_t ) * * Definieren Funktionswert D isOK S like(bool_t ) D inz * * Definieren Parameter fÃ¼r p_getOpDesc D posNr S inz like(int4_t ) D descType S inz like(int4_t ) D datatype S inz like(int4_t ) D descInf1 S inz like(int4_t ) D descInf2 S inz like(int4_t ) D dataLen S inz like(int4_t ) D feedBack S inz like(fc_t ) * * Hilfsfelder fÃ¼r Funktion: p_TestOmit D isPresent S like(int4_t ) D inz * * Arbeitsfelder D sqlStmt S like(i_sqlStmt ) inz D rc S like(SQLRETCODE_t) inz *--------------------------------------------------------------- * C Callp p_getOpDesc(1: descType: dataType: C descInf1: descInf2: C dataLen: feedBack) * C Eval sqlStmt = %subst(i_sqlStmt: 1: dataLen) * * ausfÃ¼hren SQL Anweisung C Eval rc = SQLExecDirect(g_hstmt : C %trim(sqlStmt) : C SQL_NTS ) C If f_isSqlErr(rc: o_msg) C Eval isOK = cFalse C Else C Eval isOK = cTrue C Endif * C Return isOK * P f_executeSQL... P E * *===================================================================* * Prozedur: p_cloSQL (Body) * *===================================================================* * P p_cloSQL B export * * definieren Procedure Interface ... D p_cloSQL PI * * lokale variablen ... D rc S like(SQLRETCODE_t) inz D msg S like(msg_t ) inz * ------------------------------------------------------------------------ * * EXEC SQL CLOSE c1; * ... free the statement handle C If g_hstmt <> 0 C Eval rc = SQLFreeStmt(g_hstmt: SQL_DROP) C Endif * * EXEC SQL DISCONNECT; * disconnect from the database C If g_hdbc <> 0 C Eval rc = SQLDisconnect(g_hdbc) C Endif * * free the connection handle C If g_hdbc <> 0 C Eval rc = SQLFreeConnect(g_hdbc) C Endif * * free the environment handle C If g_henv <> 0 C Eval rc = SQLFreeEnv(g_henv) C Endif * C Reset g_hstmt C Reset g_hdbc C Reset g_henv * C Return * P p_cloSQL E * *===================================================================* * Private: * Prozedur: f_isSqlErr *===================================================================* * P f_isSqlErr B * * definieren Procedure Interface ... D f_isSqlErr PI like(bool_t ) D i_rc value like(SQLRETCODE_t) D o_msg like(msg_t ) * * definieren Funktionswert ... D f_isSqlErr S like(bool_t ) * * lokale Arbeitsfelder * ------------------------------------------------------------------------ * C If (i_rc <> SQL_SUCCESS ) and C (i_rc <> SQL_SUCCESS_WITH_INFO) C Eval f_isSqlErr = cTrue C Eval o_msg = f_sqlErrMsg C Else C Eval f_isSqlErr = cFalse C Eval o_msg = f_newMsg(' ') C Endif * C Return f_isSqlErr * P f_isSqlErr E * *===================================================================* * Prozedur: f_sqlErrMsg (Body) * *===================================================================* * P f_sqlErrMsg B * * definieren Procedure Interface ... D f_sqlErrMsg PI like(msg_t ) * * definieren Funktionswert ... D f_sqlErrMsg S like(msg_t ) inz * * lokale variablen ... * ... buffer = SQL_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH + 1 D buffer S 513A D sqlState S 5A D sqlCode S like(SQLINTEGER_t ) D length S like(SQLSMALLINT_t) D msgID DS D msgID_prefix 3A D msgID_num 4S 0 * ------------------------------------------------------------------------ * C If SQLError(SQL_NULL_HENV: g_hdbc: g_hstmt: C %addr(sqlState) : C %addr(sqlCode) : C %addr(buffer) : C %size(buffer) : C %addr(length) ) = SQL_SUCCESS C Eval msgID_prefix = 'SQL' C Eval msgID_num = %abs(sqlCode) C Eval f_sqlErrMsg = f_newMsg(msgID : C cMsg_TypEscape : C %str(%addr(buffer)) : C 'QSQLMSG' : C '*LIBL' ) C Else C Eval f_sqlErrMsg = f_newMsg(' ') C Endif * C Return f_sqlErrMsg * P f_sqlErrMsg E *

There is no guarantee that * * there are no errors left and that it will work under all * * circumstances. * * * *** END HEADER FILE SPECIFICATIONS *******************************
/IF NOT DEFINED(SQL_H_SQLCLI)
* Permit duplicate Includes * /DEFINE SQL_H_SQLCLI
* generally useful constants * D SQL_FALSE C const( 0) D SQL_TRUE C const( 1) * NTS = Null Terminated string D SQL_NTS C const( -3) * Size of SQLSTATE, not including null terminating byte D SQL_SQLSTATE_SIZE... D C const( 5) D SQL_MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH... D C const(512)
* RETCODE values D SQL_SUCCESS C const( 0) D SQL_SUCCESS_WITH_INFO... D C const( 1) D SQL_NO_DATA_FOUND... D C const(100) D SQL_NEED_DATA C const( 99) D SQL_NO_DATA C const(100) D SQL_ERROR C const( -1) D SQL_INVALID_HANDLE... D C const( -2)
* SQLFreeStmt option values D SQL_CLOSE C const( 0) D SQL_DROP C const( 1) D SQL_UNBIND C const( 2) D SQL_RESET_PARAMS... D C const( 3)
* SQLSetParam defines D SQL_C_DEFAULT C const( 99)
* SQLTransact option values D SQL_COMMIT C const( 0) D SQL_ROLLBACK C const( 1) D SQL_COMMIT_HOLD... D C const( 2) D SQL_ROLLBACK_HOLD... D C const( 3)

/* =================================================================== */ /* */ /* Kurzdokumentation : */ /* */ /* Bereich . . . : RUNCLSTM */ /* Objekt . . . : RUNCLSTME */ /* Beschreibung : Tool: RUNCLSTM (Run CL Statements ) Eng */ /* Author . . . : Thomas Raddatz <thomas.raddatz@tools400.de> */ /* Datum . . . . : 03.08.2000 */ /* */ /* =================================================================== */ /* */ /* This software is free software, you can redistribute it and/or */ /* modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) */ /* as published by the Free Software Foundation. */ /* */ /* See GNU General Public License for details. */ /* http://www.opensource.org */ /* http://www.opensource.org/licenses/gpl-license.html */ /* */ /* =================================================================== */ /* History: */ /* */ /* Datum Name Ãnderung */ /* ---------- ------------ --------------------------------------- */ /* */ /* =================================================================== */ /* >>PRE-COMPILER<< */ /* */ /* >>CRTCMD<< CRTCMD CMD(&LI/&OB) + */ /* SRCFILE(&SL/&SF) + */ /* SRCMBR(&SM); */ /* */ /* >>COMPILE<< */ /* >>PARM<< PGM(*LIBL/RUNCLSTM); */ /* >>PARM<< HLPPNLGRP(*LIBL/RUNCLSTMPE); */ /* >>PARM<< HLPID(RUNCLSTM); */ /* >>PARM<< PRDLIB(&LI); */ /* >>END-COMPILE<< */ /* */ /* >>EXECUTE<< */ /* */ /* >>END-PRE-COMPILER<< */ /* =================================================================== */
CMD PROMPT('Run CL-Statements')
PARM KWD(USESRCFILE) TYPE(QUAL1) + MIN(1) + PROMPT('Source file')
PARM KWD(USESRCMBR ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(1) + PROMPT('Source member')
PARM KWD(STRSEQ ) TYPE(*DEC ) + LEN(6 2) + MIN(0) + DFT(*FIRST) + SPCVAL((*FIRST 0)) + PROMPT('Start sequence number')
PARM KWD(ENDSEQ ) TYPE(*DEC ) + LEN(6 2) + MIN(0) + DFT(*LAST) + SPCVAL((*LAST 9999,99)) + PROMPT('End sequence number')
PARM KWD(LIB ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for library (&LI)')
PARM KWD(OBJ ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for object (&OB)')
PARM KWD(TYPECODE ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(6) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for type cde (&TY)')
PARM KWD(SRCLIB ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for source library (&SL)')
PARM KWD(SRCFILE ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for source file (&SF)')
PARM KWD(SRCMBR ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for source member (&SM)')

PARM KWD(TESTOBJ ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for test object (&TO)')
PARM KWD(TGTRLS ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for target release (&TR)')
PARM KWD(FRMSRCLIB ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(10) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for from src.lib. (&FL)')

PARM KWD(USER1 ) TYPE(*CHAR) + LEN(30) + MIN(0) + DFT(*NONE) + SPCVAL((*NONE)) + PMTCTL(*PMTRQS) + PROMPT('Value for user-def. par. (&U1)')
